The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
2: import { ProductClient } from "./product-client";
3: import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
4: import { Navbar } from "@/components/layout/navbar";
5: import { Footer } from "@/components/layout/footer";
6: import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
7: 
8: export default async function ProductPage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
9:   const resolvedParams = await params;
10:   
11:   const product = await prisma.product.findUnique({
12:     where: { id: resolvedParams.id },
13:     include: { 
14:       images: true,
15:       reviews: {
16:         include: { user: true },
17:         orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }
18:       }
19:     }
20:   });
21: 
22:   if (!product) {
23:     notFound();
24:   }
25: 
26:   // Fetch Related Products (same category, exclude current)
27:   const relatedProductsData = await prisma.product.findMany({
28:     where: { 
29:       category: product.category,
30:       id: { not: product.id }
31:     },
32:     take: 4,
33:     include: { images: true }
34:   });
35: 
36:   // Track Recently Viewed and fetch it
37:   const { userId } = await auth();
38:   let recentlyViewedProductsData: any[] = [];
39:   
40:   if (userId) {
41:     const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { clerkId: userId } });
42:     if (dbUser) {
43:       // Upsert recently viewed
44:       await prisma.recentlyViewed.upsert({
45:         where: { userId_productId: { userId: dbUser.id, productId: product.id } },
46:         update: { viewedAt: new Date() },
47:         create: { userId: dbUser.id, productId: product.id }
48:       });
49: 
50:       // Fetch user's recently viewed
51:       const recentViews = await prisma.recentlyViewed.findMany({
52:         where: { userId: dbUser.id, productId: { not: product.id } },
53:         orderBy: { viewedAt: 'desc' },
54:         take: 4,
55:         include: { product: { include: { images: true } } }
56:       });
57:       recentlyViewedProductsData = recentViews.map(rv => rv.product);
58:     }
59:   }
60: 
61:   // Mock Frequently Bought Together (Products in same category with highest ratings)
62:   const frequentlyBoughtTogetherData = await prisma.product.findMany({
63:     where: { 
64:       category: product.category,
65:       id: { not: product.id }
66:     },
67:     orderBy: { rating: 'desc' },
68:     take: 2,
69:     include: { images: true }
70:   });
71: 
72:   // Parse JSON fields safely
73:   let specs = {};
74:   let features = [];
75:   try {
76:     if (product.specs) specs = JSON.parse(product.specs);
77:     if (product.features) features = JSON.parse(product.features);
78:   } catch (e) {
79:     console.error("Failed to parse product JSON fields", e);
80:   }
81: 
82:   const formattedProduct = {
83:     id: product.id,
84:     name: product.name,
85:     price: product.price,
86:     salePrice: product.salePrice,
87:     category: product.category,
88:     brand: product.brand,
89:     images: product.images.map(img => img.url),
90:     image: product.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
91:     description: product.description,
92:     rating: product.rating,
93:     reviewCount: product.reviewCount,
94:     sku: product.sku,
95:     stock: product.stock,
96:     specs,
97:     features,
98:     reviews: product.reviews.map(r => ({
99:       id: r.id,
100:       rating: r.rating,
101:       title: r.title,
102:       content: r.content,
103:       createdAt: r.createdAt.toISOString(),
104:       user: {
105:         name: r.user.name || "Verified Customer"
106:       }
107:     }))
108:   };
109: 
110:   const relatedProducts = relatedProductsData.map(rp => ({
111:     id: rp.id,
112:     name: rp.name,
113:     price: rp.price,
114:     salePrice: rp.salePrice,
115:     category: rp.category,
116:     image: rp.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
117:     rating: rp.rating,
118:   }));
119: 
120:   const recentlyViewedProducts = recentlyViewedProductsData.map(rp => ({
121:     id: rp.id,
122:     name: rp.name,
123:     price: rp.price,
124:     salePrice: rp.salePrice,
125:     category: rp.category,
126:     image: rp.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
127:     rating: rp.rating,
128:   }));
129: 
130:   const frequentlyBoughtTogether = frequentlyBoughtTogetherData.map(rp => ({
131:     id: rp.id,
132:     name: rp.name,
133:     price: rp.price,
134:     salePrice: rp.salePrice,
135:     category: rp.category,
136:     image: rp.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
137:     rating: rp.rating,
138:   }));
139: 
140:   return (
141:     <>
142:       <Navbar />
143:       <ProductClient 
144:         product={formattedProduct} 
145:         relatedProducts={relatedProducts} 
146:         recentlyViewedProducts={recentlyViewedProducts}
147:         frequentlyBoughtTogether={frequentlyBoughtTogether}
148:       />
149:       <Footer />
150:     </>
151:   );
152: }
153: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: "use client";
2: 
3: import React, { useState } from "react";
4: import Image from "next/image";
5: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
6: import { ShoppingCart, Heart, ShieldCheck, Truck, RotateCcw, Star, StarHalf, ChevronRight, Check } from "lucide-react";
7: import { AnimatedButton } from "@/components/ui/animated-button";
8: import { useCartStore } from "@/store/useCartStore";
9: import { toggleWishlist } from "@/app/actions/wishlist";
10: 
11: type ProductProps = {
12:   id: string;
13:   name: string;
14:   price: number;
15:   salePrice: number | null;
16:   category: string;
17:   brand: string;
18:   image: string;
19:   images: string[];
20:   description: string;
21:   rating: number;
22:   reviewCount: number;
23:   sku: string;
24:   stock: number;
25:   specs: Record<string, string>;
26:   features: string[];
27:   reviews?: {
28:     id: string;
29:     rating: number;
30:     title: string | null;
31:     content: string;
32:     createdAt: string;
33:     user: { name: string };
34:   }[];
35: };
36: 
37: type RelatedProduct = {
38:   id: string;
39:   name: string;
40:   price: number;
41:   salePrice: number | null;
42:   category: string;
43:   image: string;
44:   rating: number;
45: };
46: 
47: export function ProductClient({ 
48:   product, 
49:   relatedProducts,
50:   recentlyViewedProducts,
51:   frequentlyBoughtTogether 
52: }: { 
53:   product: ProductProps; 
54:   relatedProducts?: RelatedProduct[];
55:   recentlyViewedProducts?: RelatedProduct[];
56:   frequentlyBoughtTogether?: RelatedProduct[];
57: }) {
58:   const { addItem } = useCartStore();
59:   const [activeImageIndex, setActiveImageIndex] = useState(0);
60:   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"features" | "specs" | "reviews">("features");
61:   
62:   const [isReviewing, setIsReviewing] = useState(false);
63:   const [reviewRating, setReviewRating] = useState(5);
64:   const [reviewTitle, setReviewTitle] = useState("");
65:   const [reviewContent, setReviewContent] = useState("");
66:   const [isSubmittingReview, setIsSubmittingReview] = useState(false);
67: 
68:   const handleAddToCart = () => {
69:     addItem({
70:       id: product.id,
71:       name: product.name,
72:       price: product.salePrice || product.price,
73:       image: product.image,
74:       quantity: 1
75:     });
76:   };
77: 
78:   const handleToggleWishlist = async () => {
79:     try {
80:       await toggleWishlist(product.id);
81:       // We could add a local toast notification here
82:     } catch (e) {
83:       console.error(e);
84:       // Probably not logged in
85:     }
86:   };
87: 
88:   const renderStars = (rating: number) => {
89:     const stars = [];
90:     const fullStars = Math.floor(rating);
91:     const hasHalfStar = rating % 1 >= 0.5;
92: 
93:     for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
94:       if (i < fullStars) {
95:         stars.push(<Star key={i} className="w-4 h-4 fill-nova-amber text-nova-amber" />);
96:       } else if (i === fullStars && hasHalfStar) {
97:         stars.push(<StarHalf key={i} className="w-4 h-4 fill-nova-amber text-nova-amber" />);
98:       } else {
99:         stars.push(<Star key={i} className="w-4 h-4 text-nova-silver/50" />);
100:       }
101:     }
102:     return stars;
103:   };
104: 
105:   return (
106:     <main className="min-h-screen pt-32 pb-24 relative overflow-hidden">
107:       {/* Background ambient lighting */}
108:       <div className="absolute top-1/4 -left-1/4 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-nova-blue/20 rounded-full blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none" />
109:       <div className="absolute bottom-1/4 -right-1/4 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-nova-amber/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none" />
110: 
111:       <div className="container mx-auto px-6 max-w-7xl">
112:         {/* Breadcrumb */}
113:         <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-nova-silver mb-8">
114:           <span className="hover:text-white cursor-pointer transition-colors">Store</span>
115:           <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
116:           <span className="hover:text-white cursor-pointer transition-colors">{product.category}</span>
117:           <ChevronRight className="w-4 h-4" />
118:           <span className="text-white font-medium">{product.name}</span>
119:         </div>
120: 
121:         <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-12 lg:gap-20">
122:           
123:           {/* Image Gallery Stage */}
124:           <div className="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex flex-col gap-6">
125:             <motion.div 
126:               initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
127:               animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
128:               className="relative w-full aspect-square rounded-3xl glass-panel border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden bg-black/40 group"
129:             >
130:               <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-black/40 to-transparent z-0" />
131:               <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
132:                 <motion.div
133:                   key={activeImageIndex}
134:                   initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.9 }}
135:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
136:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.1 }}
137:                   transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
138:                   className="relative z-10 w-4/5 h-4/5"
139:                 >
140:                   <Image
141:                     src={product.images[activeImageIndex] || product.image}
142:                     alt={product.name}
143:                     fill
144:                     className="object-contain drop-shadow-[0_20px_50px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)] group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-700 cursor-zoom-in"
145:                   />
146:                 </motion.div>
147:               </AnimatePresence>
148: 
149:               {/* Sale Badge */}
150:               {product.salePrice && (
151:                 <div className="absolute top-6 left-6 z-20 px-4 py-2 rounded-full bg-nova-amber/20 border border-nova-amber/30 text-nova-amber font-bold tracking-wider shadow-lg backdrop-blur-md">
152:                   SALE
153:                 </div>
154:               )}
155:             </motion.div>
156: 
157:             {/* Thumbnails */}
158:             {product.images.length > 1 && (
159:               <div className="flex gap-4 overflow-x-auto pb-2 scrollbar-none">
160:                 {product.images.map((img, idx) => (
161:                   <button
162:                     key={idx}
163:                     onClick={() => setActiveImageIndex(idx)}
164:                     className={`relative w-20 h-20 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border-2 transition-all flex-shrink-0 bg-white/5 ${
165:                       activeImageIndex === idx ? "border-nova-blue opacity-100" : "border-white/10 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100"
166:                     }`}
167:                   >
168:                     <Image src={img} alt={`Thumbnail ${idx}`} fill className="object-cover" />
169:                   </button>
170:                 ))}
171:               </div>
172:             )}
173:           </div>
174: 
175:           {/* Product Info */}
176:           <motion.div 
177:             initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }}
178:             animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
179:             transition={{ delay: 0.2 }}
180:             className="w-full lg:w-1/2 flex flex-col"
181:           >
182:             <div className="mb-6">
183:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
184:                 <p className="text-nova-silver font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-sm">{product.brand}</p>
185:                 <p className="text-nova-silver text-xs">SKU: {product.sku}</p>
186:               </div>
187:               <h1 className="text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-white mb-4 leading-tight">{product.name}</h1>
188:               
189:               <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6">
190:                 <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
191:                   {renderStars(product.rating)}
192:                 </div>
193:                 <span className="text-white font-medium">{product.rating}</span>
194:                 <span className="text-nova-silver underline hover:text-white cursor-pointer transition-colors">
195:                   {product.reviewCount} Reviews
196:                 </span>
197:               </div>
198: 
199:               <div className="flex items-end gap-4 mb-6">
200:                 {product.salePrice ? (
201:                   <>
202:                     <span className="text-4xl font-bold text-nova-amber">${product.salePrice.toFixed(2)}</span>
203:                     <span className="text-xl text-nova-silver line-through mb-1">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
204:                     <span className="text-sm text-green-400 font-medium mb-2 border border-green-400/20 bg-green-400/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded">
205:                       Save ${(product.price - product.salePrice).toFixed(2)}
206:                     </span>
207:                   </>
208:                 ) : (
209:                   <span className="text-4xl font-bold text-white">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
210:                 )}
211:               </div>
212:             </div>
213: 
214:             <p className="text-nova-silver/90 text-lg leading-relaxed mb-8">
215:               {product.description}
216:             </p>
217: 
218:             <div className="mb-8">
219:               <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
220:                 <span className="text-white font-medium">Availability:</span>
221:                 {product.stock > 0 ? (
222:                   <span className="text-green-400 flex items-center gap-1">
223:                     <Check className="w-4 h-4" /> In Stock ({product.stock})
224:                   </span>
225:                 ) : (
226:                   <span className="text-red-400">Out of Stock</span>
227:                 )}
228:               </div>
229:             </div>
230: 
231:             <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-12">
232:               <AnimatedButton 
233:                 onClick={handleAddToCart}
234:                 disabled={product.stock === 0}
235:                 className="flex-1 text-lg py-4 shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(59,130,246,0.2)] flex items-center justify-center gap-3"
236:               >
237:                 <ShoppingCart className="w-5 h-5" />
238:                 {product.stock > 0 ? 'Add to Cart' : 'Out of Stock'}
239:               </AnimatedButton>
240:               <button 
241:                 onClick={handleToggleWishlist}
242:                 className="w-16 h-16 rounded-2xl glass-panel border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-nova-silver hover:text-red-400 hover:border-red-400/50 hover:bg-red-400/10 transition-all shadow-lg"
243:               >
244:                 <Heart className="w-6 h-6" />
245:               </button>
246:             </div>
247: 
248:             {/* Trust Badges */}
249:             <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 p-6 glass-panel rounded-2xl border border-white/10 bg-white/5">
250:               <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-2">
251:                 <ShieldCheck className="w-6 h-6 text-nova-blue" />
252:                 <span className="text-xs text-white/80 font-medium">2-Year Warranty</span>
253:               </div>
254:               <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-2">
255:                 <Truck className="w-6 h-6 text-nova-blue" />
256:                 <span className="text-xs text-white/80 font-medium">Free Global Shipping</span>
257:               </div>
258:               <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-2">
259:                 <RotateCcw className="w-6 h-6 text-nova-blue" />
260:                 <span className="text-xs text-white/80 font-medium">30-Day Returns</span>
261:               </div>
262:             </div>
263:           </motion.div>
264:         </div>
265: 
266:         {/* Product Details Tabs */}
267:         <div className="mt-24">
268:           <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-8 border-b border-white/10 pb-4 mb-12">
269:             {(["features", "specs", "reviews"] as const).map((tab) => (
270:               <button
271:                 key={tab}
272:                 onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
273:                 className={`text-lg font-bold capitalize transition-colors relative ${
274:                   activeTab === tab ? "text-nova-blue" : "text-nova-silver hover:text-white"
275:                 }`}
276:               >
277:                 {tab}
278:                 {activeTab === tab && (
279:                   <motion.div layoutId="tabIndicator" className="absolute -bottom-[17px] left-0 right-0 h-0.5 bg-nova-blue" />
280:                 )}
281:               </button>
282:             ))}
283:           </div>
284: 
285:           <div className="min-h-[300px]">
286:             <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
287:               {activeTab === "features" && (
288:                 <motion.div
289:                   key="features"
290:                   initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
291:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
292:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
293:                   className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-12 gap-y-8"
294:                 >
295:                   {product.features && product.features.length > 0 ? product.features.map((feature, idx) => (
296:                     <div key={idx} className="flex gap-4 p-6 glass-panel rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-white/5">
297:                       <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-nova-blue/10 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 mt-1">
298:                         <Check className="w-5 h-5 text-nova-blue" />
299:                       </div>
300:                       <div>
301:                         <h4 className="text-white font-bold text-lg mb-2">Premium Feature {idx + 1}</h4>
302:                         <p className="text-nova-silver leading-relaxed">{feature}</p>
303:                       </div>
304:                     </div>
305:                   )) : (
306:                     <p className="text-nova-silver col-span-2 text-center py-12">No specific features listed for this product.</p>
307:                   )}
308:                 </motion.div>
309:               )}
310: 
311:               {activeTab === "specs" && (
312:                 <motion.div
313:                   key="specs"
314:                   initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
315:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
316:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
317:                   className="max-w-3xl mx-auto"
318:                 >
319:                   <div className="glass-panel border border-white/10 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-black/40">
320:                     {product.specs && Object.keys(product.specs).length > 0 ? (
321:                       Object.entries(product.specs).map(([key, value], idx) => (
322:                         <div key={key} className={`flex items-center p-6 ${idx !== Object.keys(product.specs).length - 1 ? 'border-b border-white/5' : ''}`}>
323:                           <div className="w-1/3 text-nova-silver font-medium">{key}</div>
324:                           <div className="w-2/3 text-white">{value}</div>
325:                         </div>
326:                       ))
327:                     ) : (
328:                       <div className="p-12 text-center text-nova-silver">Detailed specifications are not available for this product.</div>
329:                     )}
330:                   </div>
331:                 </motion.div>
332:               )}
333: 
334:               {activeTab === "reviews" && (
335:                 <motion.div
336:                   key="reviews"
337:                   initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
338:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
339:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
340:                 >
341:                   <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-12">
342:                     {/* Review Summary */}
343:                     <div className="w-full md:w-1/3 glass-panel p-8 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 h-fit">
344:                       <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Customer Reviews</h3>
345:                       <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mb-6">
346:                         <span className="text-6xl font-bold text-white">{product.rating}</span>
347:                         <div>
348:                           <div className="flex gap-1 mb-1">{renderStars(product.rating)}</div>
349:                           <p className="text-nova-silver text-sm">Based on {product.reviewCount} reviews</p>
350:                         </div>
351:                       </div>
352:                       <AnimatedButton variant="outline" className="w-full" onClick={() => setIsReviewing(!isReviewing)}>
353:                         {isReviewing ? "Cancel" : "Write a Review"}
354:                       </AnimatedButton>
355:                     </div>
356: 
357:                     <div className="w-full md:w-2/3 space-y-6">
358:                       {isReviewing && (
359:                         <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-nova-blue/30 bg-nova-blue/5 mb-6">
360:                           <h4 className="text-white font-bold mb-4">Submit Your Review</h4>
361:                           <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
362:                             {[1,2,3,4,5].map(star => (
363:                               <button key={star} onClick={() => setReviewRating(star)}>
364:                                 <Star className={`w-6 h-6 ${star <= reviewRating ? 'fill-nova-amber text-nova-amber' : 'text-nova-silver/50'}`} />
365:                               </button>
366:                             ))}
367:                           </div>
368:                           <input 
369:                             type="text" 
370:                             placeholder="Review Title (optional)" 
371:                             value={reviewTitle}
372:                             onChange={(e) => setReviewTitle(e.target.value)}
373:                             className="w-full bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white mb-4 focus:border-nova-blue focus:outline-none"
374:                           />
375:                           <textarea 
376:                             placeholder="What did you like or dislike?" 
377:                             value={reviewContent}
378:                             onChange={(e) => setReviewContent(e.target.value)}
379:                             rows={4}
380:                             className="w-full bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white mb-4 focus:border-nova-blue focus:outline-none"
381:                           />
382:                           <AnimatedButton 
383:                             disabled={isSubmittingReview || !reviewContent.trim()}
384:                             onClick={async () => {
385:                               setIsSubmittingReview(true);
386:                               try {
387:                                 const { submitReview } = await import('@/app/actions/reviews');
388:                                 await submitReview(product.id, reviewRating, reviewContent, reviewTitle);
389:                                 setIsReviewing(false);
390:                                 setReviewContent("");
391:                                 setReviewTitle("");
392:                               } catch (e: any) {
393:                                 alert(e.message);
394:                               } finally {
395:                                 setIsSubmittingReview(false);
396:                               }
397:                             }}
398:                           >
399:                             {isSubmittingReview ? "Submitting..." : "Post Review"}
400:                           </AnimatedButton>
401:                         </div>
402:                       )}
403: 
404:                       {(!product.reviews || product.reviews.length === 0) ? (
405:                         <div className="p-12 text-center text-nova-silver glass-panel border border-white/5 rounded-2xl">
406:                           No reviews yet. Be the first to review this product!
407:                         </div>
408:                       ) : (
409:                         product.reviews.map((review) => (
410:                           <div key={review.id} className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/5">
411:                             <div className="flex justify-between items-start mb-4">
412:                               <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
413:                                 <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-nova-blue/20 flex items-center justify-center text-nova-blue font-bold uppercase">
414:                                   {review.user.name.charAt(0)}
415:                                 </div>
416:                                 <div>
417:                                   <p className="text-white font-medium">{review.user.name}</p>
418:                                   <div className="flex gap-1 mt-1">{renderStars(review.rating)}</div>
419:                                 </div>
420:                               </div>
421:                               <span className="text-nova-silver text-sm">{new Date(review.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</span>
422:                             </div>
423:                             {review.title && <h4 className="text-white font-bold mb-2">{review.title}</h4>}
424:                             <p className="text-nova-silver">
425:                               {review.content}
426:                             </p>
427:                           </div>
428:                         ))
429:                       )}
430:                     </div>
431:                   </div>
432:                 </motion.div>
433:               )}
434:             </AnimatePresence>
435:           </div>
436:         </div>
437: 
438:         {/* Frequently Bought Together */}
439:         {frequentlyBoughtTogether && frequentlyBoughtTogether.length > 0 && (
440:           <div className="mt-24 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-8 md:p-12">
441:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-8">Frequently Bought Together</h2>
442:             <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-8 items-center">
443:               {/* Main Product */}
444:               <div className="relative w-32 h-32 rounded-xl glass-panel border border-white/10 flex-shrink-0 bg-black/40">
445:                 <Image src={product.image} alt={product.name} fill className="object-contain p-2" />
446:               </div>
447:               <div className="hidden md:block text-2xl font-bold text-nova-silver/50">+</div>
448:               
449:               {/* FBT Products */}
450:               <div className="flex gap-4 md:gap-8 overflow-x-auto w-full pb-4">
451:                 {frequentlyBoughtTogether.map(fbt => (
452:                   <div key={fbt.id} className="flex gap-4 items-center min-w-[250px]">
453:                     <div className="relative w-24 h-24 rounded-xl glass-panel border border-white/10 flex-shrink-0 bg-black/40">
454:                       <Image src={fbt.image} alt={fbt.name} fill className="object-contain p-2" />
455:                     </div>
456:                     <div>
457:                       <p className="text-white text-sm font-bold line-clamp-1">{fbt.name}</p>
458:                       <p className="text-nova-gold font-medium text-sm mt-1">
459:                         ${fbt.salePrice ? fbt.salePrice.toFixed(2) : fbt.price.toFixed(2)}
460:                       </p>
461:                     </div>
462:                   </div>
463:                 ))}
464:               </div>
465:               
466:               {/* Total & Action */}
467:               <div className="ml-auto flex flex-col items-end min-w-[200px]">
468:                 <p className="text-nova-silver text-sm mb-1">Total Price:</p>
469:                 <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-4">
470:                   ${(
471:                     (product.salePrice || product.price) + 
472:                     frequentlyBoughtTogether.reduce((acc, p) => acc + (p.salePrice || p.price), 0)
473:                   ).toFixed(2)}
474:                 </p>
475:                 <AnimatedButton className="w-full">Add Bundle to Cart</AnimatedButton>
476:               </div>
477:             </div>
478:           </div>
479:         )}
480: 
481:         {/* Related Products Section */}
482:         {relatedProducts && relatedProducts.length > 0 && (
483:           <div className="mt-24">
484:             <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-8 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">You May Also Like</h2>
485:             <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
486:               {relatedProducts.map((rp) => (
487:                 <a key={rp.id} href={`/product/${rp.id}`} className="group block">
488:                   <div className="glass-panel p-4 rounded-2xl border border-white/5 h-full transition-all hover:border-nova-slate/50 hover:-translate-y-1">
489:                     <div className="relative aspect-square w-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden mb-4 bg-white/5">
490:                       <Image src={rp.image} alt={rp.name} fill className="object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500" />
491:                     </div>
492:                     <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
493:                       <p className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">{rp.category}</p>
494:                       <h3 className="text-white font-bold truncate">{rp.name}</h3>
495:                       <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
496:                         <span className="text-nova-gold font-medium">
497:                           ${rp.salePrice ? rp.salePrice.toFixed(2) : rp.price.toFixed(2)}
498:                         </span>
499:                         <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-nova-silver">
500:                           <Star className="w-3 h-3 text-nova-gold fill-nova-gold" /> {rp.rating}
501:                         </div>
502:                       </div>
503:                     </div>
504:                   </div>
505:                 </a>
506:               ))}
507:             </div>
508:           </div>
509:         )}
510: 
511:         {/* Recently Viewed Section */}
512:         {recentlyViewedProducts && recentlyViewedProducts.length > 0 && (
513:           <div className="mt-24 mb-12">
514:             <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-6 border-b border-white/10 pb-4">Recently Viewed</h2>
515:             <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
516:               {recentlyViewedProducts.map((rp) => (
517:                 <a key={rp.id} href={`/product/${rp.id}`} className="group block">
518:                   <div className="flex items-center gap-4 p-3 rounded-xl border border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
519:                     <div className="relative w-16 h-16 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-black/40 flex-shrink-0">
520:                       <Image src={rp.image} alt={rp.name} fill className="object-cover" />
521:                     </div>
522:                     <div className="overflow-hidden">
523:                       <h4 className="text-white text-sm font-medium truncate">{rp.name}</h4>
524:                       <p className="text-nova-blue text-xs mt-1">${rp.salePrice ? rp.salePrice.toFixed(2) : rp.price.toFixed(2)}</p>
525:                     </div>
526:                   </div>
527:                 </a>
528:               ))}
529:             </div>
530:           </div>
531:         )}
532: 
533:       </div>
534:     </main>
535:   );
536: }
537:

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":""use server";

import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";

export async function saveSearch(query: string, filters?: any) {
  const { userId } = await auth();
  if (!userId) {
    throw new Error("You must be signed in to save searches.");
  }

  const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { clerkId: userId } });
  if (!dbUser) {
    throw new Error("User not found.");
  }

  const existingSearch = await prisma.savedSearch.findFirst({
    where: { userId: dbUser.id, query }
  });

  if (existingSearch) {
    throw new Error("You have already saved this search.");
  }

  await prisma.savedSearch.create({
    data: {
      userId: dbUser.id,
      query,
      filters: filters ? JSON.stringify(filters) : null
    }
  });

  revalidatePath("/account");
  return { success: true };
}

export async function deleteSavedSearch(id: string) {
  const { userId } = await auth();
  if (!userId) {
    throw new Error("Unauthorized");
  }
  
  const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { clerkId: userId } });
  if (!dbUser) return;

  await prisma.savedSearch.deleteMany({
    where: { id, userId: dbUser.id }
  });

  revalidatePath("/account");
}
","Description":"Create server actions for saved searches","Overwrite":false,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/nova sphere market/nova-sphere/src/app/actions/user.ts","toolAction":"Creating user server actions","toolSummary":"Create user.ts"}}]}

The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import React from "react";
2: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
3: import { Navbar } from "@/components/layout/navbar";
4: import { Footer } from "@/components/layout/footer";
5: import { ProductGrid } from "@/components/store/product-grid";
6: 
7: export const revalidate = 60; // Revalidate at most every 60 seconds (ISR)
8: 
9: export default async function StorePage({
10:   searchParams,
11: }: {
12:   searchParams: Promise<{ [key: string]: string | string[] | undefined }>;
13: }) {
14:   const resolvedParams = await searchParams;
15:   const query = typeof resolvedParams.q === 'string' ? resolvedParams.q : undefined;
16:   const category = typeof resolvedParams.category === 'string' ? resolvedParams.category : undefined;
17:   const brand = typeof resolvedParams.brand === 'string' ? resolvedParams.brand : undefined;
18:   const minPrice = typeof resolvedParams.minPrice === 'string' ? parseFloat(resolvedParams.minPrice) : undefined;
19:   const maxPrice = typeof resolvedParams.maxPrice === 'string' ? parseFloat(resolvedParams.maxPrice) : undefined;
20:   const sort = typeof resolvedParams.sort === 'string' ? resolvedParams.sort : 'newest';
21:   const page = typeof resolvedParams.page === 'string' ? parseInt(resolvedParams.page, 10) : 1;
22:   const limit = 12;
23:   const skip = (page - 1) * limit;
24: 
25:   // Build Prisma where clause
26:   const where: any = {};
27:   if (query) {
28:     where.OR = [
29:       { name: { contains: query, mode: 'insensitive' } },
30:       { description: { contains: query, mode: 'insensitive' } },
31:     ];
32:   }
33:   if (category && category !== 'All') where.category = category;
34:   if (brand && brand !== 'All') where.brand = brand;
35:   if (minPrice !== undefined || maxPrice !== undefined) {
36:     where.price = {};
37:     if (minPrice !== undefined) where.price.gte = minPrice;
38:     if (maxPrice !== undefined) where.price.lte = maxPrice;
39:   }
40: 
41:   // Build Prisma orderBy
42:   let orderBy: any = { createdAt: 'desc' };
43:   if (sort === 'price-low') orderBy = { price: 'asc' };
44:   if (sort === 'price-high') orderBy = { price: 'desc' };
45:   if (sort === 'rating') orderBy = { rating: 'desc' };
46: 
47:   // Run Queries in parallel: filtered products, and aggregations for the filter sidebar
48:   const [products, totalCount, allCategories, allBrands] = await Promise.all([
49:     prisma.product.findMany({
50:       where,
51:       orderBy,
52:       skip,
53:       take: limit,
54:       include: { images: true },
55:     }),
56:     prisma.product.count({ where }),
57:     prisma.product.findMany({ select: { category: true }, distinct: ['category'] }),
58:     prisma.product.findMany({ select: { brand: true }, distinct: ['brand'] }),
59:   ]);
60: 
61:   const uniqueCategories = ['All', ...allCategories.map(c => c.category)];
62:   const uniqueBrands = ['All', ...allBrands.map(b => b.brand)];
63: 
64:   const formattedProducts = products.map((p) => ({
65:     id: p.id,
66:     name: p.name,
67:     price: p.price,
68:     category: p.category,
69:     brand: p.brand,
70:     image: p.images[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
71:     description: p.description,
72:     salePrice: p.salePrice,
73:     rating: p.rating,
74:     reviewCount: p.reviewCount,
75:     stock: p.stock,
76:   }));
77: 
78:   return (
79:     <main className="min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-black">
80:       <Navbar />
81:       
82:       {/* Header Section */}
83:       <section className="pt-32 pb-16 relative overflow-hidden">
84:         <div className="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[800px] h-[800px] bg-nova-blue/10 rounded-full blur-[150px] -z-10 pointer-events-none" />
85:         
86:         <div className="container mx-auto px-6 text-center">
87:           <h1 className="text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold text-white mb-6 tracking-tight">
88:             The <span className="text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-nova-blue to-nova-amber">Store</span>
89:           </h1>
90:           <p className="text-xl text-nova-silver max-w-2xl mx-auto">
91:             Browse our entire collection of next-generation technology. Your future starts here.
92:           </p>
93:         </div>
94:       </section>
95: 
96:       {/* Main Content */}
97:       <section className="flex-1 pb-24">
98:         <div className="container mx-auto px-6">
99:           <ProductGrid 
100:             initialProducts={formattedProducts} 
101:             uniqueCategories={uniqueCategories} 
102:             uniqueBrands={uniqueBrands}
103:             totalCount={totalCount}
104:             currentPage={page}
105:             limit={limit}
106:           />
107:         </div>
108:       </section>
109: 
110:       <Footer />
111:     </main>
112:   );
113: }
114: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

1: "use client";
2: 
3: import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
4: import Image from "next/image";
5: import Link from "next/link";
6: import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
7: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
8: import { Search, ShoppingCart, Filter, Star, Heart, Bookmark, Scale, X, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
9: import { useCartStore } from "@/store/useCartStore";
10: import { useCompareStore } from "@/store/useCompareStore";
11: import { AnimatedButton } from "@/components/ui/animated-button";
12: import { toggleWishlist } from "@/app/actions/wishlist";
13: import { saveSearch } from "@/app/actions/saved-searches";
14: import { CARD_HOVER } from "@/lib/animations";
15: 
16: type ProductProps = {
17:   id: string;
18:   name: string;
19:   price: number;
20:   salePrice: number | null;
21:   category: string;
22:   brand: string;
23:   image: string;
24:   description: string;
25:   rating: number;
26:   reviewCount: number;
27:   stock: number;
28: };
29: 
30: export const ProductGrid = ({ 
31:   initialProducts, 
32:   uniqueCategories, 
33:   uniqueBrands,
34:   totalCount = 0,
35:   currentPage = 1,
36:   limit = 12
37: }: { 
38:   initialProducts: ProductProps[], 
39:   uniqueCategories: string[], 
40:   uniqueBrands: string[],
41:   totalCount?: number,
42:   currentPage?: number,
43:   limit?: number
44: }) => {
45:   const router = useRouter();
46:   const searchParams = useSearchParams();
47:   
48:   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(searchParams.get("q") || "");
49:   const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("category") || "All");
50:   const [selectedBrand, setSelectedBrand] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("brand") || "All");
51:   const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("sort") || "newest");
52:   const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("minPrice") || "");
53:   const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("maxPrice") || "");
54:   
55:   const addItem = useCartStore((state) => state.addItem);
56:   const { items: compareItems, addItem: addCompare, removeItem: removeCompare } = useCompareStore();
57: 
58:   const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalCount / limit);
59: 
60:   // Apply filters via URL params
61:   const updateFilters = (newPage?: number) => {
62:     const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString());
63:     
64:     if (searchQuery) params.set("q", searchQuery);
65:     else params.delete("q");
66:     
67:     if (selectedCategory !== "All") params.set("category", selectedCategory);
68:     else params.delete("category");
69: 
70:     if (selectedBrand !== "All") params.set("brand", selectedBrand);
71:     else params.delete("brand");
72: 
73:     if (sortBy !== "newest") params.set("sort", sortBy);
74:     else params.delete("sort");
75: 
76:     if (minPrice) params.set("minPrice", minPrice);
77:     else params.delete("minPrice");
78: 
79:     if (maxPrice) params.set("maxPrice", maxPrice);
80:     else params.delete("maxPrice");
81: 
82:     if (newPage) params.set("page", newPage.toString());
83:     else params.delete("page");
84: 
85:     router.push(`/store?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false });
86:   };
87: 
88:   useEffect(() => {
89:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
90:       // Whenever search text or basic filters change, reset to page 1
91:       if (
92:         searchQuery !== (searchParams.get("q") || "") ||
93:         selectedCategory !== (searchParams.get("category") || "All") ||
94:         selectedBrand !== (searchParams.get("brand") || "All") ||
95:         sortBy !== (searchParams.get("sort") || "newest") ||
96:         minPrice !== (searchParams.get("minPrice") || "") ||
97:         maxPrice !== (searchParams.get("maxPrice") || "")
98:       ) {
99:         updateFilters(1);
100:       }
101:     }, 400);
102:     return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
103:   }, [searchQuery, selectedCategory, selectedBrand, sortBy, minPrice, maxPrice]);
104: 
105:   const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
106:     e.preventDefault();
107:     e.stopPropagation();
108:     if (product.stock === 0) return;
109:     addItem({
110:       id: product.id,
111:       name: product.name,
112:       price: product.salePrice || product.price,
113:       image: product.image,
114:       quantity: 1,
115:     });
116:   };
117: 
118:   const handleWishlist = async (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
119:     e.preventDefault();
120:     e.stopPropagation();
121:     try { await toggleWishlist(product.id); } catch (error) {}
122:   };
123: 
124:   const handleSaveSearch = async () => {
125:     try {
126:       await saveSearch(searchQuery, { category: selectedCategory, brand: selectedBrand, minPrice, maxPrice });
127:       alert("Search saved successfully!");
128:     } catch (e: any) {
129:       alert("Error saving search: " + e.message);
130:     }
131:   };
132: 
133:   const handleCompare = (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
134:     e.preventDefault();
135:     e.stopPropagation();
136:     if (compareItems.find(i => i.id === product.id)) {
137:       removeCompare(product.id);
138:     } else {
139:       if (compareItems.length >= 3) {
140:         alert("You can only compare up to 3 products.");
141:         return;
142:       }
143:       addCompare({ id: product.id, name: product.name, image: product.image });
144:     }
145:   };
146: 
147:   const clearFilters = () => {
148:     setSearchQuery("");
149:     setSelectedCategory("All");
150:     setSelectedBrand("All");
151:     setSortBy("newest");
152:     setMinPrice("");
153:     setMaxPrice("");
154:     router.push("/store", { scroll: false });
155:   };
156: 
157:   return (
158:     <div className="w-full flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8 relative pb-32">
159:       
160:       {/* Compare Floating Widget */}
161:       <AnimatePresence>
162:         {compareItems.length > 0 && (
163:           <motion.div 
164:             initial={{ y: 100, opacity: 0 }} 
165:             animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} 
166:             exit={{ y: 100, opacity: 0 }}
167:             className="fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 glass-panel border border-nova-blue/30 rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-6 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] bg-black/80"
168:           >
169:             <div className="flex gap-3">
170:               {compareItems.map(item => (
171:                 <div key={item.id} className="relative w-12 h-12 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-white/5 border border-white/10 group">
172:                   <Image src={item.image} alt={item.name} fill className="object-cover" />
173:                   <button onClick={() => removeCompare(item.id)} className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 flex items-center justify-center transition-opacity">
174:                     <X className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
175:                   </button>
176:                 </div>
177:               ))}
178:               {Array.from({ length: 3 - compareItems.length }).map((_, i) => (
179:                 <div key={i} className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center">
180:                   <span className="text-white/20 text-xs">{i + compareItems.length + 1}</span>
181:                 </div>
182:               ))}
183:             </div>
184:             <Link href={`/compare?ids=${compareItems.map(i => i.id).join(',')}`}>
185:               <AnimatedButton className="py-2 px-6 shadow-none">Compare Now</AnimatedButton>
186:             </Link>
187:           </motion.div>
188:         )}
189:       </AnimatePresence>
190: 
191:       {/* Filters Sidebar (Desktop) */}
192:       <div className="hidden lg:block w-64 flex-shrink-0 space-y-8">
193:         <div>
194:           <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
195:             <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
196:               <Filter className="w-4 h-4" /> Filters
197:             </h3>
198:             <button onClick={clearFilters} className="text-xs text-nova-silver hover:text-white transition-colors">Clear All</button>
199:           </div>
200:           <div className="space-y-6">
201:             {/* Search */}
202:             <div>
203:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Search</label>
204:               <div className="relative">
205:                 <Search className="w-4 h-4 text-nova-silver absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2" />
206:                 <input
207:                   type="text"
208:                   placeholder="Find tech..."
209:                   value={searchQuery}
210:                   onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
211:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-nova-silver/50 focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue transition-colors"
212:                 />
213:               </div>
214:             </div>
215: 
216:             {/* Category Filter */}
217:             <div>
218:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Category</label>
219:               <div className="space-y-2">
220:                 {uniqueCategories.map((category) => (
221:                   <label key={category} className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group">
222:                     <div className={`w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${selectedCategory === category ? 'bg-nova-blue border-nova-blue' : 'border-white/20 group-hover:border-white/40'}`}>
223:                       {selectedCategory === category && <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-sm" />}
224:                     </div>
225:                     <span className={`text-sm transition-colors ${selectedCategory === category ? 'text-white font-medium' : 'text-nova-silver group-hover:text-white/80'}`}>{category}</span>
226:                     <input type="radio" className="hidden" name="category" checked={selectedCategory === category} onChange={() => setSelectedCategory(category)} />
227:                   </label>
228:                 ))}
229:               </div>
230:             </div>
231: 
232:             {/* Brand Filter */}
233:             <div>
234:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Brand</label>
235:               <div className="space-y-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-white/10 scrollbar-track-transparent pr-2">
236:                 {uniqueBrands.map((brand) => (
237:                   <label key={brand} className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group">
238:                     <div className={`w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${selectedBrand === brand ? 'bg-nova-blue border-nova-blue' : 'border-white/20 group-hover:border-white/40'}`}>
239:                       {selectedBrand === brand && <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-sm" />}
240:                     </div>
241:                     <span className={`text-sm transition-colors ${selectedBrand === brand ? 'text-white font-medium' : 'text-nova-silver group-hover:text-white/80'}`}>{brand}</span>
242:                     <input type="radio" className="hidden" name="brand" checked={selectedBrand === brand} onChange={() => setSelectedBrand(brand)} />
243:                   </label>
244:                 ))}
245:               </div>
246:             </div>
247:             
248:             {/* Price Filter */}
249:             <div>
250:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Price Range</label>
251:               <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
252:                 <input 
253:                   type="number" placeholder="Min" value={minPrice} onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
254:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue"
255:                 />
256:                 <span className="text-nova-silver">-</span>
257:                 <input 
258:                   type="number" placeholder="Max" value={maxPrice} onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
259:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue"
260:                 />
261:               </div>
262:             </div>
263:             
264:             <button 
265:               onClick={handleSaveSearch}
266:               className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-sm font-medium"
267:             >
268:               <Bookmark className="w-4 h-4" /> Save this Search
269:             </button>
270: 
271:           </div>
272:         </div>
273:       </div>
274: 
275:       {/* Main Content Area */}
276:       <div className="flex-1">
277:         {/* Top Bar (Results count & Sort) */}
278:         <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between mb-8 gap-4">
279:           <p className="text-nova-silver">Showing <span className="text-white font-bold">{initialProducts.length}</span> of {totalCount} results</p>
280:           
281:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
282:             <span className="text-sm text-nova-silver">Sort by:</span>
283:             <select 
284:               value={sortBy}
285:               onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
286:               className="bg-black border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue appearance-none cursor-pointer"
287:             >
288:               <option value="newest">Newest Arrivals</option>
289:               <option value="price-low">Price: Low to High</option>
290:               <option value="price-high">Price: High to Low</option>
291:               <option value="rating">Highest Rated</option>
292:             </select>
293:           </div>
294:         </div>
295: 
296:         {/* Product Grid */}
297:         {initialProducts.length === 0 ? (
298:           <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center border border-white/5 rounded-3xl bg-white/5">
299:             <div className="w-20 h-20 mb-6 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10">
300:               <Filter className="w-8 h-8 text-nova-silver opacity-50" />
301:             </div>
302:             <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">No matching signals found.</h3>
303:             <p className="text-nova-silver">Try adjusting your filters to locate other tech.</p>
304:             <AnimatedButton variant="outline" className="mt-6" onClick={clearFilters}>Clear All Filters</AnimatedButton>
305:           </div>
306:         ) : (
307:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-12">
308:             <AnimatePresence>
309:               {initialProducts.map((product) => {
310:                 const isComparing = compareItems.some(i => i.id === product.id);
311:                 return (
312:                 <motion.div
313:                   key={product.id}
314:                   layout
315:                   variants={CARD_HOVER}
316:                   initial="rest"
317:                   whileHover="hover"
318:                   whileTap="tap"
319:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
320:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
321:                   transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
322:                   className="transform-gpu h-full"
323:                 >
324:                   <Link href={`/product/${product.id}`} className="block group h-full">
325:                     <div className="glass-panel p-5 rounded-3xl h-full border border-white/10 hover:border-nova-blue/30 transition-all duration-500 relative flex flex-col bg-black/40">
326:                       
327:                       <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-20 flex flex-col gap-2">
328:                         <button 
329:                           onClick={(e) => handleWishlist(product, e)}
330:                           className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-nova-silver hover:text-red-400 hover:border-red-400/50 transition-colors"
331:                         >
332:                           <Heart className="w-4 h-4" />
333:                         </button>
334:                         <button 
335:                           onClick={(e) => handleCompare(product, e)}
336:                           className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full backdrop-blur-md border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${
337:                             isComparing ? 'bg-nova-blue/20 border-nova-blue text-nova-blue' : 'bg-black/40 border-white/10 text-nova-silver hover:text-white hover:border-white/50'
338:                           }`}
339:                         >
340:                           <Scale className="w-4 h-4" />
341:                         </button>
342:                       </div>
343: 
344:                       {/* Sale Badge */}
345:                       {product.salePrice && product.stock > 0 && (
346:                         <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 z-20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-nova-amber/20 border border-nova-amber/30 text-nova-amber text-xs font-bold tracking-wider">
347:                           SALE
348:                         </div>
349:                       )}
350: 
351:                       <div className="relative w-full aspect-square mb-5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
352:                         <img
353:                           src={product.image}
354:                           alt={product.name}
355:                           className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-700"
356:                         />
357:                       </div>
358:                       
359:                       <div className="flex flex-col flex-1">
360:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
361:                           <p className="text-nova-silver text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">{product.brand}</p>
362:                           <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
363:                             <Star className="w-3 h-3 fill-nova-amber text-nova-amber" />
364:                             <span className="text-xs text-white font-medium">{product.rating}</span>
365:                           </div>
366:                         </div>
367:                         
368:                         <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2 line-clamp-1 group-hover:text-nova-blue transition-colors">{product.name}</h3>
369:                         
370:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-white/5">
371:                           <div className="flex flex-col">
372:                             {product.salePrice ? (
373:                               <>
374:                                 <span className="text-xs text-nova-silver line-through">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
375:                                 <span className="text-xl font-bold text-nova-amber">${product.salePrice.toFixed(2)}</span>
376:                               </>
377:                             ) : (
378:                               <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
379:                             )}
380:                           </div>
381:                           <button 
382:                             onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(product, e)}
383:                             disabled={product.stock === 0}
384:                             className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl border flex items-center justify-center text-white transition-all z-10 ${
385:                               product.stock === 0 
386:                                 ? 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' 
387:                                 : 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 hover:bg-nova-blue hover:border-nova-blue hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]'
388:                             }`}
389:                           >
390:                             <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
391:                           </button>
392:                         </div>
393:                       </div>
394:                     </div>
395:                   </Link>
396:                 </motion.div>
397:                 );
398:               })}
399:             </AnimatePresence>
400:           </div>
401:         )}
402: 
403:         {/* Pagination Controls */}
404:         {totalPages > 1 && (
405:           <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
406:             <button 
407:               onClick={() => updateFilters(currentPage - 1)}
408:               disabled={currentPage === 1}
409:               className="p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/10 text-white disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
410:             >
411:               <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
412:             </button>
413:             <div className="flex gap-2">
414:               {Array.from({ length: totalPages }).map((_, i) => (
415:                 <button
416:                   key={i}
417:                   onClick={() => updateFilters(i + 1)}
418:                   className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl font-medium transition-colors ${
419:                     currentPage === i + 1 
420:                       ? 'bg-nova-blue text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]' 
421:                       : 'border border-white/10 text-nova-silver hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'
422:                   }`}
423:                 >
424:                   {i + 1}
425:                 </button>
426:               ))}
427:             </div>
428:             <button 
429:               onClick={() => updateFilters(currentPage + 1)}
430:               disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
431:               className="p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/10 text-white disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
432:             >
433:               <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
434:             </button>
435:           </div>
436:         )}
437:       </div>
438:     </div>
439:   );
440: };
441: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

1: "use server";
2: 
3: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
4: import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
5: 
6: export async function saveSearch(query: string, filters: Record<string, string>) {
7:   const { userId } = await auth();
8:   if (!userId) throw new Error("Must be logged in to save searches");
9: 
10:   const dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { clerkId: userId } });
11:   if (!dbUser) throw new Error("User not found");
12: 
13:   await prisma.savedSearch.create({
14:     data: {
15:       userId: dbUser.id,
16:       query,
17:       filters: JSON.stringify(filters)
18:     }
19:   });
20: 
21:   return { success: true };
22: }
23:

The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
2: import { currentUser } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
3: import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
4: import { Navbar } from "@/components/layout/navbar";
5: import { Footer } from "@/components/layout/footer";
6: import { AccountClient } from "./account-client";
7: 
8: export default async function AccountPage() {
9:   const user = await currentUser();
10: 
11:   if (!user) {
12:     redirect("/sign-in");
13:   }
14: 
15:   // Find or create user in our DB
16:   let dbUser = await prisma.user.findUnique({
17:     where: { clerkId: user.id },
18:   });
19: 
20:   if (!dbUser) {
21:     dbUser = await prisma.user.create({
22:       data: {
23:         clerkId: user.id,
24:         email: user.emailAddresses[0].emailAddress,
25:         name: user.fullName || user.firstName || "User",
26:       },
27:     });
28:   }
29: 
30:   // Fetch orders
31:   const orders = await prisma.order.findMany({
32:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
33:     orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
34:     include: {
35:       items: {
36:         include: { 
37:           product: {
38:             include: { images: true }
39:           }
40:         }
41:       }
42:     }
43:   });
44: 
45:   // Fetch wishlist
46:   const wishlistItems = await prisma.wishlistItem.findMany({
47:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
48:     orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
49:     include: {
50:       product: {
51:         include: { images: true }
52:       }
53:     }
54:   });
55: 
56:   // Fetch addresses
57:   const addresses = await prisma.address.findMany({
58:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
59:     orderBy: { isDefault: "desc" }
60:   });
61: 
62:   // Fetch saved searches
63:   const savedSearches = await prisma.savedSearch.findMany({
64:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
65:     orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
66:   });
67: 
68:   // Fetch recently viewed
69:   const recentlyViewed = await prisma.recentlyViewed.findMany({
70:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
71:     orderBy: { viewedAt: "desc" },
72:     include: {
73:       product: {
74:         include: { images: true }
75:       }
76:     },
77:     take: 12
78:   });
79: 
80:   // Fetch support tickets
81:   const supportTickets = await prisma.supportTicket.findMany({
82:     where: { userId: dbUser.id },
83:     orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
84:     include: {
85:       messages: {
86:         orderBy: { createdAt: "asc" }
87:       }
88:     }
89:   });
90: 
91:   // Format data for client
92:   const formattedOrders = orders.map(o => ({
93:     id: o.id,
94:     createdAt: o.createdAt,
95:     totalAmount: o.totalAmount,
96:     status: o.status,
97:     items: o.items.map(i => ({
98:       id: i.id,
99:       quantity: i.quantity,
100:       price: i.price,
101:       product: {
102:         id: i.product.id,
103:         name: i.product.name,
104:         image: i.product.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png"
105:       }
106:     }))
107:   }));
108: 
109:   const formattedWishlist = wishlistItems.map(w => ({
110:     id: w.product.id,
111:     name: w.product.name,
112:     price: w.product.salePrice || w.product.price,
113:     image: w.product.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
114:     brand: w.product.brand,
115:     category: w.product.category
116:   }));
117: 
118:   const formattedUser = {
119:     name: dbUser.name,
120:     email: dbUser.email,
121:     imageUrl: user.imageUrl
122:   };
123: 
124:   const formattedRecentlyViewed = recentlyViewed.map(rv => ({
125:     id: rv.product.id,
126:     name: rv.product.name,
127:     price: rv.product.salePrice || rv.product.price,
128:     image: rv.product.images?.[0]?.url || "/hero-product.png",
129:     brand: rv.product.brand,
130:     category: rv.product.category,
131:     viewedAt: rv.viewedAt
132:   }));
133: 
134:   return (
135:     <>
136:       <Navbar />
137:       <AccountClient 
138:         user={formattedUser}
139:         orders={formattedOrders}
140:         wishlist={formattedWishlist}
141:         addresses={addresses}
142:         savedSearches={savedSearches}
143:         recentlyViewed={formattedRecentlyViewed}
144:         supportTickets={supportTickets}
145:       />
146:       <Footer />
147:     </>
148:   );
149: }
150: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

1: "use client";
2: 
3: import React, { useState } from "react";
4: import Image from "next/image";
5: import Link from "next/link";
6: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
7: import { Package, Heart, MapPin, Settings, LogOut, ChevronRight, ShoppingCart, Trash2, Clock, Search, MessageSquare } from "lucide-react";
8: import { useClerk } from "@clerk/nextjs";
9: import { AnimatedButton } from "@/components/ui/animated-button";
10: import { useCartStore } from "@/store/useCartStore";
11: import { toggleWishlist } from "@/app/actions/wishlist";
12: 
13: type AccountProps = {
14:   user: { name: string | null; email: string; imageUrl: string };
15:   orders: any[];
16:   wishlist: any[];
17:   addresses: any[];
18:   savedSearches?: any[];
19:   recentlyViewed?: any[];
20:   supportTickets?: any[];
21: };
22: 
23: export function AccountClient({ user, orders, wishlist, addresses, savedSearches = [], recentlyViewed = [], supportTickets = [] }: AccountProps) {
24:   const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<"orders" | "wishlist" | "addresses" | "history" | "settings" | "support">("orders");
25:   const { signOut } = useClerk();
26:   const { addItem } = useCartStore();
27: 
28:   const handleRemoveFromWishlist = async (productId: string) => {
29:     // In a real app we'd optimistically update, but here we just call the action 
30:     // and wait for the revalidatePath to refresh the page.
31:     await toggleWishlist(productId);
32:   };
33: 
34:   const handleAddToCart = (product: any) => {
35:     addItem({
36:       id: product.id,
37:       name: product.name,
38:       price: product.price,
39:       image: product.image,
40:       quantity: 1
41:     });
42:   };
43: 
44:   const tabs = [
45:     { id: "orders", label: "Orders", icon: Package },
46:     { id: "wishlist", label: "Wishlist", icon: Heart },
47:     { id: "history", label: "Browsing History", icon: Clock },
48:     { id: "addresses", label: "Addresses", icon: MapPin },
49:     { id: "support", label: "Support Tickets", icon: MessageSquare },
50:     { id: "settings", label: "Settings", icon: Settings },
51:   ] as const;
52: 
53:   return (
54:     <main className="min-h-screen pt-32 pb-24 relative overflow-hidden">
55:       <div className="absolute top-1/4 -left-1/4 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-nova-blue/10 rounded-full blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none" />
56:       <div className="absolute bottom-1/4 -right-1/4 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-nova-amber/5 rounded-full blur-[120px] -z-10 pointer-events-none" />
57: 
58:       <div className="container mx-auto px-6 max-w-6xl">
59:         <div className="mb-12">
60:           <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-white mb-2 tracking-tight">Your Account</h1>
61:           <p className="text-nova-silver">Manage your profile, orders, and preferences.</p>
62:         </div>
63: 
64:         <div className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-12">
65:           {/* Sidebar */}
66:           <div className="w-full lg:w-1/4 space-y-8">
67:             <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 flex items-center gap-4">
68:               <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden border-2 border-nova-blue">
69:                 <Image src={user.imageUrl || "/hero-product.png"} alt="Avatar" width={64} height={64} className="object-cover" />
70:               </div>
71:               <div>
72:                 <h3 className="text-white font-bold text-lg">{user.name}</h3>
73:                 <p className="text-nova-silver text-sm truncate">{user.email}</p>
74:               </div>
75:             </div>
76: 
77:             <div className="glass-panel p-4 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 flex flex-col gap-2">
78:               {tabs.map((tab) => {
79:                 const Icon = tab.icon;
80:                 return (
81:                   <button
82:                     key={tab.id}
83:                     onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)}
84:                     className={`flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-2xl transition-all ${
85:                       activeTab === tab.id 
86:                         ? "bg-nova-blue/20 text-white border border-nova-blue/30" 
87:                         : "text-nova-silver hover:bg-white/5 hover:text-white border border-transparent"
88:                     }`}
89:                   >
90:                     <Icon className="w-5 h-5" />
91:                     <span className="font-medium">{tab.label}</span>
92:                     <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ml-auto transition-transform ${activeTab === tab.id ? "opacity-100" : "opacity-0"}`} />
93:                   </button>
94:                 );
95:               })}
96: 
97:               <div className="h-px bg-white/10 my-2" />
98: 
99:               <button
100:                 onClick={() => signOut({ redirectUrl: '/' })}
101:                 className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-2xl text-red-400 hover:bg-red-400/10 transition-all font-medium border border-transparent hover:border-red-400/20"
102:               >
103:                 <LogOut className="w-5 h-5" />
104:                 <span>Sign Out</span>
105:               </button>
106:             </div>
107:           </div>
108: 
109:           {/* Main Content Area */}
110:           <div className="w-full lg:w-3/4">
111:             <AnimatePresence mode="wait">
112:               
113:               {/* ORDERS TAB */}
114:               {activeTab === "orders" && (
115:                 <motion.div
116:                   key="orders"
117:                   initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }}
118:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
119:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}
120:                   className="space-y-6"
121:                 >
122:                   <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Order History</h2>
123:                   
124:                   {orders.length === 0 ? (
125:                     <div className="glass-panel p-12 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center bg-white/5">
126:                       <div className="w-20 h-20 bg-nova-blue/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6">
127:                         <Package className="w-10 h-10 text-nova-blue opacity-80" />
128:                       </div>
129:                       <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">No orders yet</h3>
130:                       <p className="text-nova-silver mb-8">When you place an order, it will appear here.</p>
131:                       <Link href="/store">
132:                         <AnimatedButton>Start Shopping</AnimatedButton>
133:                       </Link>
134:                     </div>
135:                   ) : (
136:                     orders.map((order) => (
137:                       <div key={order.id} className="glass-panel rounded-3xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden">
138:                         <div className="bg-white/5 px-6 py-4 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-4 border-b border-white/10">
139:                           <div>
140:                             <p className="text-xs text-nova-silver uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Order Placed</p>
141:                             <p className="text-white font-medium">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</p>
142:                           </div>
143:                           <div>
144:                             <p className="text-xs text-nova-silver uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Total</p>
145:                             <p className="text-white font-medium">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</p>
146:                           </div>
147:                           <div>
148:                             <p className="text-xs text-nova-silver uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Status</p>
149:                             <span className="px-3 py-1 bg-nova-amber/20 text-nova-amber text-xs font-bold rounded-full tracking-wider border border-nova-amber/30">
150:                               {order.status}
151:                             </span>
152:                           </div>
153:                           <div className="text-right">
154:                             <p className="text-xs text-nova-silver uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Order #</p>
155:                             <p className="text-white font-mono text-sm">{order.id.split('-')[0]}</p>
156:                           </div>
157:                         </div>
158:                         
159:                         <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
160:                           {order.items.map((item: any) => (
161:                             <div key={item.id} className="flex gap-6 items-center">
162:                               <Link href={`/product/${item.product.id}`} className="relative w-24 h-24 bg-black/40 rounded-xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 group">
163:                                 <Image src={item.product.image} alt={item.product.name} fill className="object-contain p-2 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform" />
164:                               </Link>
165:                               <div className="flex-1">
166:                                 <Link href={`/product/${item.product.id}`}>
167:                                   <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-1 hover:text-nova-blue transition-colors line-clamp-1">{item.product.name}</h3>
168:                                 </Link>
169:                                 <p className="text-nova-silver text-sm mb-2">Qty: {item.quantity}</p>
170:                                 <p className="text-white font-bold">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</p>
171:                               </div>
172:                               <div className="hidden sm:block">
173:                                 <AnimatedButton variant="outline" className="px-6 py-2 text-sm">Buy Again</AnimatedButton>
174:                               </div>
175:                             </div>
176:                           ))}
177:                         </div>
178:                       </div>
179:                     ))
180:                   )}
181:                 </motion.div>
182:               )}
183: 
184:               {/* WISHLIST TAB */}
185:               {activeTab === "wishlist" && (
186:                 <motion.div
187:                   key="wishlist"

189:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }}
190:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

193:                   
194:                   {wishlist.length === 0 ? (
195:                     <div className="glass-panel p-12 rounded-3xl border border-white/10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center bg-white/5">

199:                       <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Your wishlist is empty</h3>
