Showing lines 1 to 100
The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
2: import { auth, currentUser } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
3: 
4: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
5: 
6: export async function POST(req: Request) {
7:   try {
8:     const { userId } = await auth();
9:     const user = await currentUser();
10: 
11:     if (!userId || !user) {
12:       return new NextResponse("Unauthorized", { status: 401 });
13:     }
14: 
15:     const body = await req.json();
16:     const { items, total } = body;
17: 
18:     if (!items || items.length === 0) {
19:       return new NextResponse("Items are required", { status: 400 });
20:     }
21: 
22:     // Ensure user exists in our Prisma DB
23:     const dbUser = await prisma.user.upsert({
24:       where: { clerkId: userId },
25:       update: {
26:         email: user.emailAddresses[0].emailAddress,
27:         name: `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}`,
28:       },
29:       create: {
30:         clerkId: userId,
31:         email: user.emailAddresses[0].emailAddress,
32:         name: `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}`,
33:       },
34:     });
35: 
36:     // Calculate realistic totals for security instead of trusting client total
37:     let subtotal = 0;
38:     const dbItems = await prisma.product.findMany({
39:       where: { id: { in: items.map((i: any) => i.id) } }
40:     });
41: 
42:     const itemsToCreate = items.map((item: any) => {
43:       const dbProduct = dbItems.find(p => p.id === item.id);
44:       const priceToUse = dbProduct ? (dbProduct.salePrice || dbProduct.price) : item.price;
45:       subtotal += priceToUse * item.quantity;
46:       return {
47:         productId: item.id,
48:         quantity: item.quantity,
49:         price: priceToUse,
50:       };
51:     });
52: 
53:     const discountAmount = subtotal - total; // Since total sent from client is discounted
54:     const tax = subtotal * 0.08; // 8% mock tax
55:     const shippingCost = subtotal > 100 ? 0 : 15.00; // Free shipping over $100
56:     const finalTotal = subtotal - discountAmount + tax + shippingCost;
57: 
58:     // Use transaction to ensure stock is decreased atomically
59:     const order = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
60:       for (const item of itemsToCreate) {
61:         const product = await tx.product.findUnique({ where: { id: item.productId } });
62:         if (!product || product.stock < item.quantity) {
63:           throw new Error(`Insufficient stock for product ${product?.name || item.productId}`);
64:         }
65:       }
66: 
67:       const newOrder = await tx.order.create({
68:         data: {
69:           userId: dbUser.id,
70:           subtotal: subtotal,
71:           tax: tax,
72:           shippingCost: shippingCost,
73:           discount: discountAmount,
74:           totalAmount: finalTotal,
75:           status: "PENDING",
76:           items: {
77:             create: itemsToCreate,
78:           },
79:         },
80:       });
81: 
82:       // Grant Loyalty Points (1 point per $1 spent)
83:       const pointsEarned = Math.floor(finalTotal);
84:       await tx.user.update({
85:         where: { id: dbUser.id },
86:         data: { loyaltyPoints: { increment: pointsEarned } }
87:       });
88: 
89:       return newOrder;
90:     });
91: 
92:     return NextResponse.json({ success: true, checkoutUrl: "/checkout/simulate?orderId=" + order.id });
93:   } catch (error) {
94:     if (error instanceof Error) {
95:       return new NextResponse(error.message, { status: 400 });
96:     }
97:     return new NextResponse("Internal Error", { status: 500 });
98:   }
99: }
100: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

1: import React from "react";\r
2: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";\r
3: import { OrderActions } from "./order-actions";\r
4: \r
5: \r
6: export default async function AdminOrdersPage() {\r
7:   const orders = await prisma.order.findMany({\r
8:     include: {\r
9:       user: true,\r
10:       items: {\r
11:         include: { product: true }\r
12:       }\r
13:     },\r
14:     orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' }\r
15:   });\r
16: \r
17:   return (\r
18:     <div className="p-8">\r
19:       <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Order Management</h1>\r
20:       <p className="text-nova-silver mb-8">View and manage all customer orders.</p>\r
21: \r
22:       <div className="glass-panel rounded-2xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden">\r
23:         <table className="w-full text-left">\r
24:           <thead className="bg-white/5 border-b border-white/10">\r
25:             <tr>\r
26:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium">Order ID</th>\r
27:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium">Customer</th>\r
28:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium">Date</th>\r
29:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium">Status</th>\r
30:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium">Items</th>\r
31:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium text-right">Total</th>\r
32:               <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-medium text-center">Actions</th>\r
33:             </tr>\r
34:           </thead>\r
35:           <tbody className="divide-y divide-white/5">\r
36:             {orders.length === 0 ? (\r
37:               <tr>\r
38:                 <td colSpan={6} className="p-8 text-center text-nova-silver">No orders found.</td>\r
39:               </tr>\r
40:             ) : (\r
41:               orders.map((order) => (\r
42:                 <tr key={order.id} className="hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">\r
43:                   <td className="p-4 text-white font-mono text-sm">{order.id.slice(-8)}</td>\r
44:                   <td className="p-4 text-white">{order.user.name || order.user.email}</td>\r
45:                   <td className="p-4 text-nova-silver">{new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</td>\r
46:                   <td className="p-4">\r
47:                     <span className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-full border ${\r
48:                       order.status === 'PENDING' ? 'bg-yellow-500/20 text-yellow-400 border-yellow-500/20' :\r
49:                       order.status === 'PAID' ? 'bg-nova-emerald/20 text-nova-emerald border-nova-emerald/20' :\r
50:                       'bg-nova-blue/20 text-nova-blue border-nova-blue/20'\r
51:                     }`}>\r
52:                       {order.status}\r
53:                     </span>\r
54:                   </td>\r
55:                   <td className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-sm">{order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)} items</td>\r
56:                   <td className="p-4 text-right text-white font-medium">${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)}</td>\r
57:                   <td className="p-4 text-center">\r
58:                     <OrderActions orderId={order.id} currentStatus={order.status} />\r
59:                   </td>\r
60:                 </tr>\r
61:               ))\r
62:             )}\r
63:           </tbody>\r
64:         </table>\r
65:       </div>\r
66:     </div>\r
67:   );\r
68: }\r

3: import React, { useState } from "react";\r
4: import { updateOrderStatus, processRefund } from "./actions";\r
5: import { MoreVertical, Loader2, CheckCircle2, Package, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react";\r
6: \r
7: interface OrderActionsProps {\r
8:   orderId: string;\r
9:   currentStatus: string;\r
10: }\r
11: \r
12: export function OrderActions({ orderId, currentStatus }: OrderActionsProps) {\r
13:   const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false);\r
14:   const [isPending, setIsPending] = useState(false);\r
15: \r
16:   async function handleStatusUpdate(newStatus: string) {\r
17:     setIsPending(true);\r
18:     setIsOpen(false);\r
19:     try {\r
20:       await updateOrderStatus(orderId, newStatus);\r
21:     } catch (e) {\r
22:       alert("Failed to update status");\r
23:     } finally {\r
24:       setIsPending(false);\r
25:     }\r
26:   }\r
27: \r
28:   async function handleRefund() {\r
29:     if (!confirm("Are you sure you want to refund this order? This action cannot be undone.")) return;\r
30:     setIsPending(true);\r
31:     setIsOpen(false);\r
32:     try {\r
33:       await processRefund(orderId);\r
34:     } catch (e) {\r
35:       alert("Failed to process refund");\r
36:     } finally {\r
37:       setIsPending(false);\r
38:     }\r
39:   }\r
40: \r
41:   return (\r
42:     <div className="relative">\r
43:       <button \r
44:         onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}\r
45:         disabled={isPending}\r
46:         className="p-2 text-nova-silver hover:text-white rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors"\r
47:       >\r
48:         {isPending ? <Loader2 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin" /> : <MoreVertical className="w-4 h-4" />}\r
49:       </button>\r
50: \r
51:       {isOpen && (\r
52:         <>\r
53:           <div className="fixed inset-0 z-10" onClick={() => setIsOpen(false)} />\r
54:           <div className="absolute right-0 mt-2 w-48 rounded-xl bg-[#1A1A2E] border border-white/10 shadow-2xl z-20 overflow-hidden py-1">\r
55:             <div className="px-3 py-2 border-b border-white/10 text-xs text-nova-silver font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">\r
56:               Update Status\r
57:             </div>\r
58:             {['PENDING', 'PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'DELIVERED'].map((status) => (\r
59:               <button\r
60:                 key={status}\r
61:                 onClick={() => handleStatusUpdate(status)}\r
62:                 disabled={status === currentStatus}\r
63:                 className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white hover:bg-white/5 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-transparent flex items-center justify-between"\r
64:               >\r
65:                 {status}\r
66:                 {status === currentStatus && <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-nova-emerald" />}\r
67:               </button>\r
68:             ))}\r
69:             \r
70:             <div className="border-t border-white/10 mt-1 pt-1">\r
71:               <button\r
72:                 onClick={handleRefund}\r
73:                 disabled={currentStatus === 'REFUNDED' || currentStatus === 'CANCELLED'}\r
74:                 className="w-full text-left px-4 py-2 text-sm text-red-400 hover:bg-red-400/10 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:hover:bg-transparent flex items-center gap-2"\r
75:               >\r
76:                 <RefreshCw className="w-4 h-4" />\r
77:                 Process Refund\r
78:               </button>\r
79:             </div>\r
80:           </div>\r
81:         </>\r
82:       )}\r
83:     </div>\r
84:   );\r
85: }\r
86: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.
"}

{"step_index":6614,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-26T20:56:23Z","content":"Created At: 2026-06-26T20:56:23Z
Completed At: 2026-06-26T20:56:23Z
File Path: `file:///C:/Users/charl/nova%20sphere%20market/nova-sphere/src/app/actions/order.ts`
Total Lines: 139
Total Bytes: 3659
Showing lines 1 to 139
The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: "use server";
2: 
3: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
4: import { revalidatePath } from "next/cache";
5: import { auth } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
6: import { strictRateLimiter } from "@/lib/rate-limit";
7: 
8: export async function cancelOrder(orderId: string) {
9:   const { userId } = await auth();
10:   
11:   if (!userId) {
12:     return { success: false, error: "Unauthorized" };
13:   }
14: 
15:   if (!strictRateLimiter.check(`cancel_order_${userId}`)) {
16:     return { success: false, error: "Too many requests. Try again later." };
17:   }
18: 
19:   try {
20:     const result = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
21:       // Find the order
22:       const order = await tx.order.findUnique({
23:         where: { id: orderId },
24:         include: { items: true, user: true }
25:       });
26: 
27:       if (!order) {
28:         throw new Error("Order not found");
29:       }
30: 
31:       if (order.user.clerkId !== userId) {
32:         throw new Error("Unauthorized to cancel this order");
33:       }
34: 
35:       if (order.status === "CANCELLED") {
36:         throw new Error("Order is already cancelled");
37:       }
38: 
39:       if (order.status === "SHIPPED" || order.status === "DELIVERED") {
40:         throw new Error("Cannot cancel an order that has already shipped");
41:       }
42: 
43:       // Restore inventory
44:       for (const item of order.items) {
45:         await tx.product.update({
46:           where: { id: item.productId },
47:           data: { stock: { increment: item.quantity } }
48:         });
49:       }
50: 
51:       // Update order status
52:       const updatedOrder = await tx.order.update({
53:         where: { id: orderId },
54:         data: { status: "CANCELLED" }
55:       });
56: 
57:       return updatedOrder;
58:     });
59: 
60:     revalidatePath("/account");
61:     revalidatePath(`/order/${orderId}`);
62:     return { success: true, order: result };
63:   } catch (error: any) {
64:     return { success: false, error: error.message };
65:   }
66: }
67: 
68: export async function refundOrder(orderId: string) {
69:   const { userId } = await auth();
70:   
71:   if (!userId) {
72:     return { success: false, error: "Unauthorized" };
73:   }
74: 
75:   // Verify super admin
76:   const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
77:     where: { clerkId: userId },
78:     select: { role: true }
79:   });
80: 
81:   if (user?.role !== "SUPER_ADMIN") {
82:     return { success: false, error: "Only admins can refund orders" };
83:   }
84: 
85:   try {
86:     const result = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
87:       const order = await tx.order.findUnique({
88:         where: { id: orderId },
89:         include: { items: true }
90:       });
91: 
92:       if (!order) {
93:         throw new Error("Order not found");
94:       }
95: 
96:       if (order.status === "REFUNDED" || order.status === "CANCELLED") {
97:         throw new Error(`Order is already ${order.status}`);
98:       }
99: 
100:       if (order.status === "PENDING") {
101:         throw new Error("Cannot refund a pending order. Cancel it instead.");
102:       }
103: 
104:       // Restore inventory
105:       for (const item of order.items) {
106:         await tx.product.update({
107:           where: { id: item.productId },
108:           data: { stock: { increment: item.quantity } }
109:         });
110:       }
111: 
112:       // Update order status
113:       const updatedOrder = await tx.order.update({
114:         where: { id: orderId },
115:         data: { status: "REFUNDED" }
116:       });
117: 
118:       // Log admin action
119:       await tx.adminLog.create({
120:         data: {
121:           adminId: userId,
122:           action: "REFUND_ORDER",
123:           entity: "Order",
124:           entityId: orderId,
125:           details: JSON.stringify({ amount: order.totalAmount })
126:         }
127:       });
128: 
129:       return updatedOrder;
130:     });
131: 
132:     revalidatePath("/admin/orders");
133:     revalidatePath(`/order/${orderId}`);
134:     return { success: true, order: result };
135:   } catch (error: any) {
136:     return { success: false, error: error.message };
137:   }
138: }
139: 
The above content shows the entire, complete file contents of the requested file.

{"step_index":6616,"source":"MODEL","type":"PLANNER_RESPONSE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-26T20:56:23Z","thinking":"**Prioritizing Tool Usage**

I'm now focusing on tool selection, emphasizing specific tools over general ones where possible. The goal is to optimize efficiency by leveraging tools like 'view_file' directly, rather than resorting to broader, less direct methods. I'm aiming for targeted actions.


**Formulating Stripe Integration**

I'm now formulating the implementation plan for Milestone 13, starting with simulated Stripe integration for safety. I am recalling critical instruction 1, that emphasizes specific tool usage over general ones, and critical instruction 2, which stresses explicit tool listing before execution, especially for Stripe integration. This involves developing a mocked SDK layer initially before integrating the real API.


**Implementing Stripe Integration**

I'm now integrating the Stripe SDK and updating the checkout route to leverage Stripe if the key is present; otherwise, it falls back. I'm also creating a webhook route for session completion and refund events, and updating the financial data model with Stripe IDs and currency details. I am now working on currency switcher, using mock exchange rates. Lastly, I'm working on invoice generation.


","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"ArtifactMetadata":{"RequestFeedback":true,"Summary":"Implementation plan for Milestone 13","UserFacing":true},"CodeContent":"# Milestone 13: Payment & Financial Systems Implementation Plan

This milestone transforms the application's simple checkout simulation into a robust, auditable financial system. We will implement structural Stripe integration, multi-currency support, tax/shipping logic, and financial reporting.

## User Review Required
> [!IMPORTANT]
> Because we do not have live Stripe API keys configured in the environment, the Stripe integration will be built to **fallback to simulation mode** when keys are missing. However, the exact Stripe SDK logic (Checkout Sessions, Webhooks) will be written perfectly for production use.
> 
> Please click **Proceed** if you approve of this approach.

## Proposed Changes

### 1. Stripe Payment Gateway Integration
- **Install SDK**: Add `stripe` and `@stripe/stripe-js` to `package.json`.
- **Checkout Route (`src/app/api/checkout/route.ts`)**: Update to create a Stripe Checkout Session if `STRIPE_SECRET_KEY` is present.
- **Webhook Listener (`src/app/api/webhook/stripe/route.ts`)**: Handle `checkout.session.completed` to mark orders as PAID, and `charge.refunded` to mark them as REFUNDED securely.

### 2. Database Schema Updates (`prisma/schema.prisma`)
- Expand the `Order` model to include financial audit fields:
  - `stripeSessionId` (String, optional)
  - `stripePaymentIntentId` (String, optional)
  - `currency` (String, default "USD")
  - `exchangeRate` (Float, default 1.0)
- Add a new `Transaction` model to log granular ledger entries (charges, refunds, fees).

### 3. Multi-Currency Support
- **Zustand Store (`src/store/currency-store.ts`)**: Manage active currency state.
- **Currency Switcher**: Add a dropdown in the `Navbar` to toggle between USD, EUR, and GBP.
- **Dynamic Formatting**: Update product prices across the UI to convert and display based on the selected currency using mock exchange rates (e.g., 1 USD = 0.95 EUR).

### 4. Advanced Tax & Shipping Calculations
- Refactor the checkout API to calculate dynamic tax rates (e.g., 8% base) and tiered shipping (e.g., Free over $100, $15 otherwise).

### 5. Invoice Generation
- Create `/app/order/[id]/invoice/page.tsx`: A clean, print-optimized HTML invoice containing company details, tax breakdowns, shipping, and order line items.
- Add "View Invoice" buttons for both Customers (Order History) and Admins (Order Management).

### 6. Financial Reporting Dashboard
- **`/app/admin/financials/page.tsx`**: A new Admin page explicitly for financial auditing.
- Metrics: Gross Revenue, Total Refunds, Net Revenue, Tax Liabilities, and Shipping Costs Collected.
- Log of all recent transactions with their Stripe IDs and status.

## Verification Plan
1. `npx prisma db push` succeeds after schema updates.
2. Building the project throws no errors with the new Stripe typings.
3. The Currency Switcher accurately updates prices across the storefront.
4. The Financial Dashboard accurately aggregates existing simulated orders.

=== PLAN 13 ===

# Milestone 13: Payment & Financial Systems Tasks

- `[ ]` 1. Database Schema Updates (`stripeSessionId`, `currency`, `Transaction` model) & `db push`
- `[ ]` 2. Install Stripe SDK (`npm i stripe @stripe/stripe-js`)
- `[ ]` 3. Update Checkout API (`src/app/api/checkout/route.ts`)
- `[ ]` 4. Create Webhook Listener (`src/app/api/webhook/stripe/route.ts`)
- `[ ]` 5. Implement Multi-Currency Support (Store, Switcher in Navbar, Pricing conversion)
- `[ ]` 6. Invoice Generation (`src/app/order/[id]/invoice/page.tsx`)
- `[ ]` 7. Financial Reporting Dashboard (`src/app/admin/financials/page.tsx` & Sidebar Link)","Description":"Create task list for Milestone 13","Overwrite":true,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/.gemini/antigravity/brain/17f86a0d-ba69-4e6f-9890-3f7c5369343f/task.md","toolAction":"Creating task list","toolSummary":"Update task.md"}}]}

{"step_index":6660,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-26T21:04:20Z","content":"Created At: 2026-06-26T21:04:20Z
Completed At: 2026-06-26T21:04:21Z
File Path: `file:///C:/Users/charl/nova%20sphere%20market/nova-sphere/src/app/api/checkout/route.ts`
Total Lines: 100
Total Bytes: 3218
Showing lines 1 to 100
The following code has been modified to include a line number before every line, in the format: <line_number>: <original_line>. Please note that any changes targeting the original code should remove the line number, colon, and leading space.
1: import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
2: import { auth, currentUser } from "@clerk/nextjs/server";
3: 
4: import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
5: 
6: export async function POST(req: Request) {
7:   try {
8:     const { userId } = await auth();
9:     const user = await currentUser();
10: 
11:     if (!userId || !user) {
12:       return new NextResponse("Unauthorized", { status: 401 });
13:     }
14: 
15:     const body = await req.json();
16:     const { items, total } = body;
17: 
18:     if (!items || items.length === 0) {
19:       return new NextResponse("Items are required", { status: 400 });
20:     }
21: 
22:     // Ensure user exists in our Prisma DB
23:     const dbUser = await prisma.user.upsert({
24:       where: { clerkId: userId },
25:       update: {
26:         email: user.emailAddresses[0].emailAddress,
27:         name: `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}`,
28:       },
29:       create: {
30:         clerkId: userId,
31:         email: user.emailAddresses[0].emailAddress,
32:         name: `${user.firstName} ${user.lastName}`,
33:       },
34:     });
35: 
36:     // Calculate realistic totals for security instead of trusting client total
37:     let subtotal = 0;
38:     const dbItems = await prisma.product.findMany({
39:       where: { id: { in: items.map((i: any) => i.id) } }
40:     });
41: 
42:     const itemsToCreate = items.map((item: any) => {
43:       const dbProduct = dbItems.find(p => p.id === item.id);
44:       const priceToUse = dbProduct ? (dbProduct.salePrice || dbProduct.price) : item.price;
45:       subtotal += priceToUse * item.quantity;
46:       return {
47:         productId: item.id,
48:         quantity: item.quantity,
49:         price: priceToUse,
50:       };
51:     });
52: 
53:     const discountAmount = subtotal - total; // Since total sent from client is discounted
54:     const tax = subtotal * 0.08; // 8% mock tax
55:     const shippingCost = subtotal > 100 ? 0 : 15.00; // Free shipping over $100
56:     const finalTotal = subtotal - discountAmount + tax + shippingCost;
57: 
58:     // Use transaction to ensure stock is decreased atomically
59:     const order = await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
60:       for (const item of itemsToCreate) {
61:         const product = await tx.product.findUnique({ where: { id: item.productId } });
62:         if (!product || product.stock < item.quantity) {
63:           throw new Error(`Insufficient stock for product ${product?.name || item.productId}`);
64:         }
65:       }
66: 
67:       const newOrder = await tx.order.create({
68:         data: {
69:           userId: dbUser.id,
70:           subtotal: subtotal,
71:           tax: tax,
72:           shippingCost: shippingCost,
73:           discount: discountAmount,
74:           totalAmount: finalTotal,
75:           status: "PENDING",
76:           items: {
77:             create: itemsToCreate,
78:           },
79:         },
80:       });
81: 
82:       // Grant Loyalty Points (1 point per $1 spent)
83:       const pointsEarned = Math.floor(finalTotal);
84:       await tx.user.update({
85:         where: { id: dbUser.id },
86:         data: { loyaltyPoints: { increment: pointsEarned } }
87:       });
88: 
89:       return newOrder;
90:     });
91: 
92:     return NextResponse.json({ success: true, checkoutUrl: "/checkout/simulate?orderId=" + order.id });
93:   } catch (error) {
94:     if (error instanceof Error) {
95:       return new NextResponse(error.message, { status: 400 });
96:     }
97:     return new NextResponse("Internal Error", { status: 500 });
98:   }
99: }

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":"import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { stripe } from "@/lib/stripe";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  if (!stripe) {
    return new NextResponse("Stripe not configured", { status: 400 });
  }

  const body = await req.text();
  const signature = req.headers.get("stripe-signature");

  let event;

  try {
    event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(
      body,
      signature as string,
      process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET!
    );
  } catch (error: any) {
    return new NextResponse(`Webhook Error: ${error.message}`, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    switch (event.type) {
      case "checkout.session.completed": {
        const session = event.data.object as any;
        const orderId = session.metadata?.orderId;
        const paymentIntentId = session.payment_intent;
        
        if (orderId) {
          await prisma.order.update({
            where: { id: orderId },
            data: { 
              status: "PAID",
              stripePaymentIntentId: paymentIntentId as string
            },
          });

          await prisma.transaction.create({
            data: {
              orderId,
              type: "CHARGE",
              amount: session.amount_total / 100,
              currency: session.currency.toUpperCase(),
              stripeId: paymentIntentId as string,
              status: "SUCCEEDED"
            }
          });
        }
        break;
      }
      
      case "charge.refunded": {
        const charge = event.data.object as any;
        const paymentIntentId = charge.payment_intent;
        
        const order = await prisma.order.findUnique({
          where: { stripePaymentIntentId: paymentIntentId as string }
        });

        if (order) {
          await prisma.order.update({
            where: { id: order.id },
            data: { status: "REFUNDED" }
          });

          await prisma.transaction.create({
            data: {
              orderId: order.id,
              type: "REFUND",
              amount: charge.amount_refunded / 100,
              currency: charge.currency.toUpperCase(),
              stripeId: charge.id,
              status: "SUCCEEDED"
            }
          });
        }
        break;
      }
    }

    return new NextResponse("Webhook processed", { status: 200 });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Webhook processing error", error);
    return new NextResponse("Webhook handler error", { status: 500 });
  }
}
","Description":"Create Stripe webhook listener","Overwrite":false,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/nova sphere market/nova-sphere/src/app/api/webhook/stripe/route.ts","toolAction":"Creating webhook listener","toolSummary":"Create webhook route"}}]}

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":"import { create } from 'zustand';
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware';

type Currency = 'USD' | 'EUR' | 'GBP';

interface CurrencyState {
  currency: Currency;
  exchangeRates: Record<Currency, number>;
  setCurrency: (currency: Currency) => void;
  formatPrice: (priceInUSD: number) => string;
}

export const useCurrencyStore = create<CurrencyState>()(
  persist(
    (set, get) => ({
      currency: 'USD',
      // Mock exchange rates (1 USD = ...)
      exchangeRates: {
        USD: 1.0,
        EUR: 0.95,
        GBP: 0.82
      },
      setCurrency: (currency) => set({ currency }),
      formatPrice: (priceInUSD) => {
        const { currency, exchangeRates } = get();
        const converted = priceInUSD * exchangeRates[currency];
        
        return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
          style: 'currency',
          currency: currency,
          currencyDisplay: 'narrowSymbol'
        }).format(converted);
      }
    }),
    {
      name: 'nova-currency-storage',
    }
  )
);
","Description":"Create Currency Zustand store","Overwrite":false,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/nova sphere market/nova-sphere/src/store/currency-store.ts","toolAction":"Creating currency store","toolSummary":"Create currency-store.ts"}}]}

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":"import React from "react";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
import { format } from "date-fns";

export default async function InvoicePage({ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }) {
  const resolvedParams = await params;
  const order = await prisma.order.findUnique({
    where: { id: resolvedParams.id },
    include: {
      user: true,
      items: {
        include: { product: true }
      }
    }
  });

  if (!order) return notFound();

  return (
    <div className="bg-white min-h-screen p-8 text-black font-sans">
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto border border-gray-200 p-12 shadow-sm bg-white">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="flex justify-between items-start border-b border-gray-200 pb-8 mb-8">
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-3xl font-black tracking-widest text-black uppercase mb-1">NOVA SPHERE</h1>
            <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">MARKETPLACE INC.</p>
            <div className="mt-4 text-sm text-gray-600 space-y-1">
              <p>123 Future Way, Suite 400</p>
              <p>San Francisco, CA 94107</p>
              <p>billing@novasphere.com</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="text-right">
            <h2 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-200 mb-2 uppercase tracking-wider">Invoice</h2>
            <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 space-y-1">
              <p><span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">Invoice #:</span> {order.id.slice(-10).toUpperCase()}</p>
              <p><span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">Date:</span> {format(new Date(order.createdAt), "MMM dd, yyyy")}</p>
              {order.stripeSessionId && (
                <p><span className="font-semibold text-gray-800">Transaction ID:</span> {order.stripeSessionId.slice(0, 16)}...</p>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Bill To */}
        <div className="mb-10">
          <h3 className="text-sm font-bold text-gray-800 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3">Billed To</h3>
          <div className="text-sm text-gray-600 space-y-1">
            <p className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-base">{order.user.name || "Customer"}</p>
            <p>{order.user.email}</p>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Line Items */}
        <table className="w-full mb-10 text-sm text-left">
          <thead>
            <tr className="border-b border-gray-300 text-gray-800">
              <th className="py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs">Description</th>
              <th className="py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs text-center w-24">Qty</th>
              <th className="py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs text-right w-32">Unit Price</th>
              <th className="py-3 font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs text-right w-32">Amount</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody className="divide-y divide-gray-100">
            {order.items.map((item) => (
              <tr key={item.id}>
                <td className="py-4">
                  <p className="font-medium text-gray-900">{item.product.name}</p>
                  <p className="text-gray-500 text-xs mt-1">SKU: {item.product.sku}</p>
                </td>
                <td className="py-4 text-center text-gray-700">{item.quantity}</td>
                <td className="py-4 text-right text-gray-700">${item.price.toFixed(2)}</td>
                <td className="py-4 text-right font-medium text-gray-900">${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}</td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>

        {/* Totals */}
        <div className="flex justify-end">
          <div className="w-64 space-y-3 text-sm">
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-600">
              <span>Subtotal</span>
              <span>${order.subtotal.toFixed(2)}</span>
            </div>
            {order.discount > 0 && (
              <div className="flex justify-between text-red-600">
                <span>Discount</span>
                <span>-${order.discount.toFixed(2)}</span>
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-600">
              <span>Shipping</span>
              <span>{order.shippingCost > 0 ? `$${order.shippingCost.toFixed(2)}` : 'Free'}</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-between text-gray-600">
              <span>Tax (8%)</span>
              <span>${order.tax.toFixed(2)}</span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-between font-bold text-lg text-gray-900 border-t border-gray-300 pt-3 mt-3">
              <span>Total</span>
              <span>${order.totalAmount.toFixed(2)} {order.currency}</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="mt-16 pt-8 border-t border-gray-200 text-center text-xs text-gray-500">
          <p className="mb-2">Thank you for your business.</p>
          <p>Payment Status: <span className="font-bold text-gray-800">{order.status}</span></p>
          <p className="mt-4 no-print text-blue-600 hover:underline cursor-pointer" onClick={() => {/* Will be converted to client component or handled via JS */}}>
            <button className="px-4 py-2 bg-black text-white rounded mt-4" onClick="window.print()">Print Invoice</button>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
","Description":"Create Invoice page","Overwrite":false,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/nova sphere market/nova-sphere/src/app/order/[id]/invoice/page.tsx","toolAction":"Creating invoice page","toolSummary":"Create order invoice page"}}]}

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":""use client";

import React from "react";
import { Printer } from "lucide-react";

export function PrintButton() {
  return (
    <button 
      onClick={() => window.print()}
      className="px-6 py-2 bg-black hover:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg flex items-center gap-2 mx-auto font-medium transition-colors"
    >
      <Printer className="w-4 h-4" />
      Print Invoice
    </button>
  );
}

","tool_calls":[{"name":"write_to_file","args":{"CodeContent":"import React from "react";
import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";
import { DollarSign, TrendingUp, RefreshCw, Landmark, Receipt, FileText } from "lucide-react";

export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";

export default async function FinancialsDashboard() {
  const [
    allOrders,
    transactions,
    recentRefunds
  ] = await Promise.all([
    prisma.order.findMany({
      where: { status: { in: ["PAID", "SHIPPED", "DELIVERED", "REFUNDED"] } },
      select: { totalAmount: true, status: true, tax: true, shippingCost: true, discount: true }
    }),
    prisma.transaction.findMany({
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      take: 20,
      include: { order: true }
    }),
    prisma.transaction.findMany({
      where: { type: "REFUND" },
      orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
      take: 5,
      include: { order: true }
    })
  ]);

  const grossRevenue = allOrders.reduce((sum, order) => sum + order.totalAmount, 0);
  const totalTax = allOrders.reduce((sum, order) => sum + order.tax, 0);
  const totalShipping = allOrders.reduce((sum, order) => sum + order.shippingCost, 0);
  const totalRefunded = allOrders
    .filter(o => o.status === "REFUNDED")
    .reduce((sum, order) => sum + order.totalAmount, 0);
  
  const netRevenue = grossRevenue - totalRefunded - totalTax - totalShipping;

  return (
    <div className="p-8">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-8">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Financial Overview</h1>
          <p className="text-nova-silver">Real-time revenue, taxes, and transaction history.</p>
        </div>
        <button className="flex items-center gap-2 bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-lg border border-white/10 transition-colors">
          <FileText className="w-4 h-4" />
          Export CSV
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* KPIs */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6 mb-10">
        <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-nova-emerald/10 rounded-full blur-[40px] -mr-10 -mt-10 group-hover:bg-nova-emerald/20 transition-all" />
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 mb-4 relative z-10">
            <TrendingUp className="w-5 h-5 text-nova-emerald" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-nova-silver mb-1 text-sm relative z-10">Gross Revenue</h3>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white relative z-10">${grossRevenue.toFixed(2)}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-red-500/10 rounded-full blur-[40px] -mr-10 -mt-10 group-hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-all" />
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 mb-4 relative z-10">
            <RefreshCw className="w-5 h-5 text-red-400" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-nova-silver mb-1 text-sm relative z-10">Total Refunded</h3>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white relative z-10">${totalRefunded.toFixed(2)}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-nova-blue/10 rounded-full blur-[40px] -mr-10 -mt-10 group-hover:bg-nova-blue/20 transition-all" />
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 mb-4 relative z-10">
            <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5 text-nova-blue" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-nova-silver mb-1 text-sm relative z-10">Net Revenue</h3>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white relative z-10">${netRevenue.toFixed(2)}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-purple-500/10 rounded-full blur-[40px] -mr-10 -mt-10 group-hover:bg-purple-500/20 transition-all" />
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 mb-4 relative z-10">
            <Landmark className="w-5 h-5 text-purple-400" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-nova-silver mb-1 text-sm relative z-10">Taxes Collected</h3>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white relative z-10">${totalTax.toFixed(2)}</p>
        </div>

        <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 relative overflow-hidden group">
          <div className="absolute top-0 right-0 w-32 h-32 bg-amber-500/10 rounded-full blur-[40px] -mr-10 -mt-10 group-hover:bg-amber-500/20 transition-all" />
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 mb-4 relative z-10">
            <Receipt className="w-5 h-5 text-amber-400" />
          </div>
          <h3 className="text-nova-silver mb-1 text-sm relative z-10">Shipping Collected</h3>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-white relative z-10">${totalShipping.toFixed(2)}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
        <div className="lg:col-span-2">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Ledger / Transactions</h2>
          <div className="glass-panel rounded-2xl border border-white/10 overflow-hidden">
            <table className="w-full text-left">
              <thead className="bg-white/5 border-b border-white/10">
                <tr>
                  <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Date</th>
                  <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Type</th>
                  <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Gateway ID</th>
                  <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Status</th>
                  <th className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-right">Amount</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody className="divide-y divide-white/5">
                {transactions.length === 0 ? (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={5} className="p-8 text-center text-nova-silver">No transactions recorded yet.</td>
                  </tr>
                ) : (
                  transactions.map((tx) => (
                    <tr key={tx.id} className="hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
                      <td className="p-4 text-nova-silver text-sm">{new Date(tx.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                      <td className="p-4">
                        <span className={`px-2 py-1 text-xs rounded-full border ${tx.type === 'CHARGE' ? 'bg-nova-emerald/10 text-nova-emerald border-nova-emerald/20' : 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border-red-500/20'}`}>
                          {tx.type}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="p-4 text-nova-silver font-mono text-xs">{tx.stripeId || "SIMULATED"}</td>
                      <td className="p-4">
                        <span className="text-nova-silver text-sm">{tx.status}</span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="p-4 text-right text-white font-medium">
                        {tx.type === 'REFUND' ? '-' : ''}${tx.amount.toFixed(2)} {tx.currency}
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div>
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-6">Recent Refunds</h2>
          <div className="glass-panel p-6 rounded-2xl border border-white/10 space-y-4">
            {recentRefunds.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-nova-silver text-sm">No refunds processed recently.</p>
            ) : (
              recentRefunds.map(refund => (
                <div key={refund.id} className="flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/5 pb-4 last:border-0 last:pb-0">
                  <div>
                    <h4 className="text-white font-medium text-sm">Order #{refund.orderId.slice(-8)}</h4>
                    <p className="text-nova-silver text-xs font-mono">{refund.stripeId || "SIMULATED"}</p>
                  </div>
                  <span className="text-red-400 font-bold text-sm">
                    -${refund.amount.toFixed(2)}
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
","Description":"Create Financials Dashboard","Overwrite":false,"TargetFile":"C:/Users/charl/nova sphere market/nova-sphere/src/app/admin/financials/page.tsx","toolAction":"Creating financials dashboard","toolSummary":"Create admin/financials/page.tsx"}}]}

1: "use client";
2: 
3: import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
4: import Image from "next/image";
5: import Link from "next/link";
6: import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
7: import { motion, AnimatePresence } from "framer-motion";
8: import { Search, ShoppingCart, Filter, Star, Heart, Bookmark, Scale, X, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
9: import { useCartStore } from "@/store/useCartStore";
10: import { useCompareStore } from "@/store/useCompareStore";
11: import { AnimatedButton } from "@/components/ui/animated-button";
12: import { toggleWishlist } from "@/app/actions/wishlist";
13: import { saveSearch } from "@/app/actions/saved-searches";
14: import { CARD_HOVER } from "@/lib/animations";
15: 
16: type ProductProps = {
17:   id: string;
18:   name: string;
19:   price: number;
20:   salePrice: number | null;
21:   category: string;
22:   brand: string;
23:   image: string;
24:   description: string;
25:   rating: number;
26:   reviewCount: number;
27:   stock: number;
28: };
29: 
30: export const ProductGrid = ({ 
31:   initialProducts, 
32:   uniqueCategories, 
33:   uniqueBrands,
34:   totalCount = 0,
35:   currentPage = 1,
36:   limit = 12
37: }: { 
38:   initialProducts: ProductProps[], 
39:   uniqueCategories: string[], 
40:   uniqueBrands: string[],
41:   totalCount?: number,
42:   currentPage?: number,
43:   limit?: number
44: }) => {
45:   const router = useRouter();
46:   const searchParams = useSearchParams();
47:   
48:   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(searchParams.get("q") || "");
49:   const [selectedCategory, setSelectedCategory] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("category") || "All");
50:   const [selectedBrand, setSelectedBrand] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("brand") || "All");
51:   const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("sort") || "newest");
52:   const [minPrice, setMinPrice] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("minPrice") || "");
53:   const [maxPrice, setMaxPrice] = useState<string>(searchParams.get("maxPrice") || "");
54:   
55:   const addItem = useCartStore((state) => state.addItem);
56:   const { items: compareItems, addItem: addCompare, removeItem: removeCompare } = useCompareStore();
57: 
58:   const totalPages = Math.ceil(totalCount / limit);
59: 
60:   // Apply filters via URL params
61:   const updateFilters = (newPage?: number) => {
62:     const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString());
63:     
64:     if (searchQuery) params.set("q", searchQuery);
65:     else params.delete("q");
66:     
67:     if (selectedCategory !== "All") params.set("category", selectedCategory);
68:     else params.delete("category");
69: 
70:     if (selectedBrand !== "All") params.set("brand", selectedBrand);
71:     else params.delete("brand");
72: 
73:     if (sortBy !== "newest") params.set("sort", sortBy);
74:     else params.delete("sort");
75: 
76:     if (minPrice) params.set("minPrice", minPrice);
77:     else params.delete("minPrice");
78: 
79:     if (maxPrice) params.set("maxPrice", maxPrice);
80:     else params.delete("maxPrice");
81: 
82:     if (newPage) params.set("page", newPage.toString());
83:     else params.delete("page");
84: 
85:     router.push(`/store?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false });
86:   };
87: 
88:   useEffect(() => {
89:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
90:       // Whenever search text or basic filters change, reset to page 1
91:       if (
92:         searchQuery !== (searchParams.get("q") || "") ||
93:         selectedCategory !== (searchParams.get("category") || "All") ||
94:         selectedBrand !== (searchParams.get("brand") || "All") ||
95:         sortBy !== (searchParams.get("sort") || "newest") ||
96:         minPrice !== (searchParams.get("minPrice") || "") ||
97:         maxPrice !== (searchParams.get("maxPrice") || "")
98:       ) {
99:         updateFilters(1);
100:       }
101:     }, 400);
102:     return () => clearTimeout(timeout);
103:   }, [searchQuery, selectedCategory, selectedBrand, sortBy, minPrice, maxPrice]);
104: 
105:   const handleAddToCart = (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
106:     e.preventDefault();
107:     e.stopPropagation();
108:     if (product.stock === 0) return;
109:     addItem({
110:       id: product.id,
111:       name: product.name,
112:       price: product.salePrice || product.price,
113:       image: product.image,
114:       quantity: 1,
115:     });
116:   };
117: 
118:   const handleWishlist = async (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
119:     e.preventDefault();
120:     e.stopPropagation();
121:     try { await toggleWishlist(product.id); } catch (error) {}
122:   };
123: 
124:   const handleSaveSearch = async () => {
125:     try {
126:       await saveSearch(searchQuery, { category: selectedCategory, brand: selectedBrand, minPrice, maxPrice });
127:       alert("Search saved successfully!");
128:     } catch (e: any) {
129:       alert("Error saving search: " + e.message);
130:     }
131:   };
132: 
133:   const handleCompare = (product: ProductProps, e: React.MouseEvent) => {
134:     e.preventDefault();
135:     e.stopPropagation();
136:     if (compareItems.find(i => i.id === product.id)) {
137:       removeCompare(product.id);
138:     } else {
139:       if (compareItems.length >= 3) {
140:         alert("You can only compare up to 3 products.");
141:         return;
142:       }
143:       addCompare({ id: product.id, name: product.name, image: product.image });
144:     }
145:   };
146: 
147:   const clearFilters = () => {
148:     setSearchQuery("");
149:     setSelectedCategory("All");
150:     setSelectedBrand("All");
151:     setSortBy("newest");
152:     setMinPrice("");
153:     setMaxPrice("");
154:     router.push("/store", { scroll: false });
155:   };
156: 
157:   return (
158:     <div className="w-full flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-8 relative pb-32">
159:       
160:       {/* Compare Floating Widget */}
161:       <AnimatePresence>
162:         {compareItems.length > 0 && (
163:           <motion.div 
164:             initial={{ y: 100, opacity: 0 }} 
165:             animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} 
166:             exit={{ y: 100, opacity: 0 }}
167:             className="fixed bottom-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-50 glass-panel border border-nova-blue/30 rounded-2xl p-4 flex items-center gap-6 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)] bg-black/80"
168:           >
169:             <div className="flex gap-3">
170:               {compareItems.map(item => (
171:                 <div key={item.id} className="relative w-12 h-12 rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-white/5 border border-white/10 group">
172:                   <Image src={item.image} alt={item.name} fill className="object-cover" />
173:                   <button onClick={() => removeCompare(item.id)} className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/60 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 flex items-center justify-center transition-opacity">
174:                     <X className="w-4 h-4 text-white" />
175:                   </button>
176:                 </div>
177:               ))}
178:               {Array.from({ length: 3 - compareItems.length }).map((_, i) => (
179:                 <div key={i} className="w-12 h-12 rounded-lg border border-dashed border-white/20 flex items-center justify-center">
180:                   <span className="text-white/20 text-xs">{i + compareItems.length + 1}</span>
181:                 </div>
182:               ))}
183:             </div>
184:             <Link href={`/compare?ids=${compareItems.map(i => i.id).join(',')}`}>
185:               <AnimatedButton className="py-2 px-6 shadow-none">Compare Now</AnimatedButton>
186:             </Link>
187:           </motion.div>
188:         )}
189:       </AnimatePresence>
190: 
191:       {/* Filters Sidebar (Desktop) */}
192:       <div className="hidden lg:block w-64 flex-shrink-0 space-y-8">
193:         <div>
194:           <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
195:             <h3 className="text-white font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
196:               <Filter className="w-4 h-4" /> Filters
197:             </h3>
198:             <button onClick={clearFilters} className="text-xs text-nova-silver hover:text-white transition-colors">Clear All</button>
199:           </div>
200:           <div className="space-y-6">
201:             {/* Search */}
202:             <div>
203:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Search</label>
204:               <div className="relative">
205:                 <Search className="w-4 h-4 text-nova-silver absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2" />
206:                 <input
207:                   type="text"
208:                   placeholder="Find tech..."
209:                   value={searchQuery}
210:                   onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
211:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 pl-10 pr-4 text-sm text-white placeholder:text-nova-silver/50 focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue transition-colors"
212:                 />
213:               </div>
214:             </div>
215: 
216:             {/* Category Filter */}
217:             <div>
218:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Category</label>
219:               <div className="space-y-2">
220:                 {uniqueCategories.map((category) => (
221:                   <label key={category} className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group">
222:                     <div className={`w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${selectedCategory === category ? 'bg-nova-blue border-nova-blue' : 'border-white/20 group-hover:border-white/40'}`}>
223:                       {selectedCategory === category && <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-sm" />}
224:                     </div>
225:                     <span className={`text-sm transition-colors ${selectedCategory === category ? 'text-white font-medium' : 'text-nova-silver group-hover:text-white/80'}`}>{category}</span>
226:                     <input type="radio" className="hidden" name="category" checked={selectedCategory === category} onChange={() => setSelectedCategory(category)} />
227:                   </label>
228:                 ))}
229:               </div>
230:             </div>
231: 
232:             {/* Brand Filter */}
233:             <div>
234:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Brand</label>
235:               <div className="space-y-2 max-h-48 overflow-y-auto scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-white/10 scrollbar-track-transparent pr-2">
236:                 {uniqueBrands.map((brand) => (
237:                   <label key={brand} className="flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group">
238:                     <div className={`w-4 h-4 rounded border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${selectedBrand === brand ? 'bg-nova-blue border-nova-blue' : 'border-white/20 group-hover:border-white/40'}`}>
239:                       {selectedBrand === brand && <div className="w-2 h-2 bg-white rounded-sm" />}
240:                     </div>
241:                     <span className={`text-sm transition-colors ${selectedBrand === brand ? 'text-white font-medium' : 'text-nova-silver group-hover:text-white/80'}`}>{brand}</span>
242:                     <input type="radio" className="hidden" name="brand" checked={selectedBrand === brand} onChange={() => setSelectedBrand(brand)} />
243:                   </label>
244:                 ))}
245:               </div>
246:             </div>
247:             
248:             {/* Price Filter */}
249:             <div>
250:               <label className="text-nova-silver text-xs uppercase tracking-wider mb-2 block">Price Range</label>
251:               <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
252:                 <input 
253:                   type="number" placeholder="Min" value={minPrice} onChange={(e) => setMinPrice(e.target.value)}
254:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue"
255:                 />
256:                 <span className="text-nova-silver">-</span>
257:                 <input 
258:                   type="number" placeholder="Max" value={maxPrice} onChange={(e) => setMaxPrice(e.target.value)}
259:                   className="w-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl py-2 px-3 text-sm text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue"
260:                 />
261:               </div>
262:             </div>
263:             
264:             <button 
265:               onClick={handleSaveSearch}
266:               className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors text-sm font-medium"
267:             >
268:               <Bookmark className="w-4 h-4" /> Save this Search
269:             </button>
270: 
271:           </div>
272:         </div>
273:       </div>
274: 
275:       {/* Main Content Area */}
276:       <div className="flex-1">
277:         {/* Top Bar (Results count & Sort) */}
278:         <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center justify-between mb-8 gap-4">
279:           <p className="text-nova-silver">Showing <span className="text-white font-bold">{initialProducts.length}</span> of {totalCount} results</p>
280:           
281:           <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
282:             <span className="text-sm text-nova-silver">Sort by:</span>
283:             <select 
284:               value={sortBy}
285:               onChange={(e) => setSortBy(e.target.value)}
286:               className="bg-black border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 text-white text-sm focus:outline-none focus:border-nova-blue appearance-none cursor-pointer"
287:             >
288:               <option value="newest">Newest Arrivals</option>
289:               <option value="price-low">Price: Low to High</option>
290:               <option value="price-high">Price: High to Low</option>
291:               <option value="rating">Highest Rated</option>
292:             </select>
293:           </div>
294:         </div>
295: 
296:         {/* Product Grid */}
297:         {initialProducts.length === 0 ? (
298:           <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-24 text-center border border-white/5 rounded-3xl bg-white/5">
299:             <div className="w-20 h-20 mb-6 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10">
300:               <Filter className="w-8 h-8 text-nova-silver opacity-50" />
301:             </div>
302:             <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">No matching signals found.</h3>
303:             <p className="text-nova-silver">Try adjusting your filters to locate other tech.</p>
304:             <AnimatedButton variant="outline" className="mt-6" onClick={clearFilters}>Clear All Filters</AnimatedButton>
305:           </div>
306:         ) : (
307:           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-12">
308:             <AnimatePresence>
309:               {initialProducts.map((product) => {
310:                 const isComparing = compareItems.some(i => i.id === product.id);
311:                 return (
312:                 <motion.div
313:                   key={product.id}
314:                   layout
315:                   variants={CARD_HOVER}
316:                   initial="rest"
317:                   whileHover="hover"
318:                   whileTap="tap"
319:                   animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }}
320:                   exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }}
321:                   transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
322:                   className="transform-gpu h-full"
323:                 >
324:                   <Link href={`/product/${product.id}`} className="block group h-full">
325:                     <div className="glass-panel p-5 rounded-3xl h-full border border-white/10 hover:border-nova-blue/30 transition-all duration-500 relative flex flex-col bg-black/40">
326:                       
327:                       <div className="absolute top-4 right-4 z-20 flex flex-col gap-2">
328:                         <button 
329:                           onClick={(e) => handleWishlist(product, e)}
330:                           className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-nova-silver hover:text-red-400 hover:border-red-400/50 transition-colors"
331:                         >
332:                           <Heart className="w-4 h-4" />
333:                         </button>
334:                         <button 
335:                           onClick={(e) => handleCompare(product, e)}
336:                           className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full backdrop-blur-md border flex items-center justify-center transition-colors ${
337:                             isComparing ? 'bg-nova-blue/20 border-nova-blue text-nova-blue' : 'bg-black/40 border-white/10 text-nova-silver hover:text-white hover:border-white/50'
338:                           }`}
339:                         >
340:                           <Scale className="w-4 h-4" />
341:                         </button>
342:                       </div>
343: 
344:                       {/* Sale Badge */}
345:                       {product.salePrice && product.stock > 0 && (
346:                         <div className="absolute top-4 left-4 z-20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-nova-amber/20 border border-nova-amber/30 text-nova-amber text-xs font-bold tracking-wider">
347:                           SALE
348:                         </div>
349:                       )}
350: 
351:                       <div className="relative w-full aspect-square mb-5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center p-6">
352:                         <img
353:                           src={product.image}
354:                           alt={product.name}
355:                           className="w-full h-full object-contain drop-shadow-2xl group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-700"
356:                         />
357:                       </div>
358:                       
359:                       <div className="flex flex-col flex-1">
360:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
361:                           <p className="text-nova-silver text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider">{product.brand}</p>
362:                           <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
363:                             <Star className="w-3 h-3 fill-nova-amber text-nova-amber" />
364:                             <span className="text-xs text-white font-medium">{product.rating}</span>
365:                           </div>
366:                         </div>
367:                         
368:                         <h3 className="text-lg font-bold text-white mb-2 line-clamp-1 group-hover:text-nova-blue transition-colors">{product.name}</h3>
369:                         
370:                         <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-auto pt-4 border-t border-white/5">
371:                           <div className="flex flex-col">
372:                             {product.salePrice ? (
373:                               <>
374:                                 <span className="text-xs text-nova-silver line-through">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
375:                                 <span className="text-xl font-bold text-nova-amber">${product.salePrice.toFixed(2)}</span>
376:                               </>
377:                             ) : (
378:                               <span className="text-xl font-bold text-white">${product.price.toFixed(2)}</span>
379:                             )}
380:                           </div>
381:                           <button 
382:                             onClick={(e) => handleAddToCart(product, e)}
383:                             disabled={product.stock === 0}
384:                             className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl border flex items-center justify-center text-white transition-all z-10 ${
385:                               product.stock === 0 
386:                                 ? 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' 
387:                                 : 'bg-white/5 border-white/10 hover:bg-nova-blue hover:border-nova-blue hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.5)]'
388:                             }`}
389:                           >
390:                             <ShoppingCart className="w-4 h-4" />
391:                           </button>
392:                         </div>
393:                       </div>
394:                     </div>
395:                   </Link>
396:                 </motion.div>
397:                 );
398:               })}
399:             </AnimatePresence>
400:           </div>
401:         )}
402: 
403:         {/* Pagination Controls */}
404:         {totalPages > 1 && (
405:           <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-4">
406:             <button 
407:               onClick={() => updateFilters(currentPage - 1)}
408:               disabled={currentPage === 1}
409:               className="p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/10 text-white disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
410:             >
411:               <ChevronLeft className="w-5 h-5" />
412:             </button>
413:             <div className="flex gap-2">
414:               {Array.from({ length: totalPages }).map((_, i) => (
415:                 <button
416:                   key={i}
417:                   onClick={() => updateFilters(i + 1)}
418:                   className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-xl font-medium transition-colors ${
419:                     currentPage === i + 1 
420:                       ? 'bg-nova-blue text-white shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.3)]' 
421:                       : 'border border-white/10 text-nova-silver hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'
422:                   }`}
423:                 >
424:                   {i + 1}
425:                 </button>
426:               ))}
427:             </div>
428:             <button 
429:               onClick={() => updateFilters(currentPage + 1)}
430:               disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
431:               className="p-2 rounded-xl border border-white/10 text-white disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"
432:             >
433:               <ChevronRight className="w-5 h-5" />
434:             </button>
435:           </div>
436:         )}
437:       </div>
438:     </div>
439:   );
440: };

{"step_index":6725,"source":"MODEL","type":"VIEW_FILE","status":"DONE","created_at":"2026-06-26T21:08:18Z","content":"Created At: 2026-06-26T21:08:18Z

File Path: `file:///C:/Users/charl/nova%20sphere%20market/nova-sphere/src/app/product/%5Bid%5D/product-client.tsx`
